title: Minimum-Weight Steiner Triangulation of Convex Polygons Requires Interior Steiner Points
summary: We construct a convex polygon for which the minimum-weight Steiner triangulation requires an interior Steiner point. This provides a counterexample to a 1994 conjecture of Eppstein that minimum-weight Steiner triangulation of convex polygons needs only Steiner points on the boundary of the polygon.

AI.tldr: 本文构造了一个凸多边形，其最小权Steiner三角剖分需要内部Steiner点，从而否定了Eppstein 1994年的猜想。
AI.motivation: 否定Eppstein 1994年提出的凸多边形最小权Steiner三角剖分仅需边界上Steiner点的猜想。
AI.method: 构造一个具体的凸多边形作为反例。
AI.result: 发现某些凸多边形的最小权Steiner三角剖分确实需要内部Steiner点。
AI.conclusion: Eppstein的猜想是错误的，凸多边形的最小权Steiner三角剖分有时需要内部Steiner点。

relevance_reason: This paper is about computational geometry (Steiner triangulation of convex polygons) - a theoretical mathematics topic. It has nothing to do with Text-to-Motion Generation, Video Generation Models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM-based quality filtering, or any of the methods/pain points in the research profile. The application domain is completely different - this is pure computational geometry, not computer graphics/computer vision for motion generation.

title: Segment Watchman Routes
comment: 19 pages, 10 figures, accepted to the 51st International Symposium on Mathematical Foundations of Computer Science (MFCS 2026)
summary:
Motivated by applications for robust guarding, we consider a variant of the multiple-watchmen problem that ensures that every point within a polygon $P$ is seen from more than one direction: we search for two routes $W_1,W_2$, such that every point $p\in P$ is contained in a segment $\overline{w_1w_2}\subseteq P$ such that $w_1\in W_1$ and $w_2\in W_2$. We call such routes segment watchman routes.
  We show that finding the two routes that are optimal with respect to the min-max criterion is weakly NP-hard even in simple polygons, and that finding the routes that are optimal with respect to the min-sum criterion is NP-hard in polygons with holes. Moreover, we present sufficient conditions for routes to be segment watchman routes, and provide a polynomial-time $2$-approximation under both the min-max criterion and the min-sum criterion, both in simple polygons. Finally, we show how to generalize our results for $k$ watchmen.

AI.tldr: 研究分段监视路线问题，寻找两条路线使多边形内每个点都能被至少两个不同方向的观察点看到。证明该问题在简单多边形中弱NP难，在有洞多边形中NP难，并提出2近似算法。
AI.motivation: 应用需求驱动，旨在实现稳健的监护（guarding），确保多边形内每个点都能从多于一个方向被看到，增强监控系统的可靠性。
AI.method: 计算几何方法，分析问题复杂度（NP难证明），设计多项式时间近似算法，推广到k个监视员的一般情况。
AI.result: 1）min-max标准最优解在简单多边形中弱NP难；2）min-sum标准最优解在有洞多边形中NP难；3）提出充分条件保证路线为分段监视路线；4）提供多项式时间2近似算法（适用于两种标准和简单多边形）；5）可推广到k个监视员。
AI.conclusion: 该问题是计算困难的，但存在有效近似解法，为Robust Guarding应用提供了理论依据和实用算法。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation in Computer Graphics/Computer Vision (specifically video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance, VLM-based quality filtering, and 3D motion generation). The paper is about computational geometry for the "segment watchman routes" problem - finding routes so that a polygon can be viewed from multiple directions. This is NOT related to motion generation, video generation, text-to-motion, or any of the methods mentioned in the research profile. The paper deals with guard problems in computational geometry, which is a completely different field.

title: Sharp approximate Carathéodory theorem and application to iterated Delaunay refinement
comment: Extended, corrected, and substantially strengthened version of Chapter 2 of arXiv:2112.07573. 61 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables
summary: We analyze the decrease of simplex diameters under iterated refinement of spherical Delaunay complexes. Unlike in ordinary subdivision, the refined Delaunay complex need not be a subdivision of the previous one, so mesh contraction is not automatic. We derive explicit contraction bounds for several families of Steiner points, including Delaunay analogues of barycentric and edgewise subdivision. The proof reduces the problem to sharp covering estimates for Euclidean simplices. These estimates are obtained through a strengthening of Maurey's empirical method via pivotal sampling and a dimension-dependent version of the approximate Carathéodory theorem. Theoretical results and numerical experiments show that Delaunay refinements achieve stronger contraction than their subdivision counterparts.

AI.tldr: 研究球面Delaunay复合体在迭代细化下单纯形直径的减小问题，与普通细分不同，细化的Delaunay复合体不一定是前一个的细分，因此网格收缩并非自动实现。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在解决Delaunay细化中网格收缩的非自动性问题。传统细分方法中，细化后的网格总是前一个网格的细分，但Delaunay细化不具有这一性质，因此需要建立新的理论框架来理解和预测网格收缩行为。
AI.method: 将问题简化为欧几里得单纯形的覆盖估计问题，通过Maurey经验方法的增强版（枢纽采样）和维度相关的近似Carathéodory定理来获得精确的覆盖估计。
AI.result: 为多种Steiner点族推导了明确的收缩边界，包括Delaunay化的重心细分和边细分。理论和数值实验表明Delaunay细化比对应的细分方法实现更强的收缩效果。
AI.conclusion: Delaunay细化在网格收缩方面优于传统细分方法，这一结论在理论和数值实验中均得到验证，为网格生成算法提供了新的优化方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about computational geometry and Delaunay mesh refinement - a completely different field. It addresses mathematical theory for mesh contraction in numerical methods, with no relevance to text-to-motion generation, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM-based quality filtering, or any of the pain points mentioned in the research profile. The application domain is entirely different - this is pure mathematics applied to mesh generation, not computer graphics/computer vision for motion or video generation.

title: Furthest Pair Requires Quadratic Time in Superconstant Dimension under SETH
summary:
Several fundamental problems in computational geometry admit algorithms with running time $f(d) \cdot n^{2-Θ(1/d)}$ for $n$ points in $d$ dimensions, making them among the most prominent examples of barely subquadratic computation. Notable members of this class include Furthest Pair, Bichromatic Closest Pair, (Bichromatic) Maximum Innter Product, and Hopcroft's Problem. Chen [Theory Comput. 2020] proved that, assuming the Strong Exponential Time Hypothesis (SETH), these problems require $n^{2-o(1)}$ time when the dimension satisfies $d=2^{Θ(\log^* n)}$. We extend this lower bound to all efficiently constructible dimensions $d=ω(1)$. Thus, assuming SETH, the dependence of the best known algorithms on the dimension is essentially unavoidable. The proof utilizes techniques in OpenAI's recent disproof of the Erdos unit distance conjecture.
  The proof was initially discovered by ChatGPT 5.5 Pro. The authors have validated and substantially edited the proof to improve the presentation.

AI.tldr: 本文将Chen (2020)针对特定维度的下界扩展到所有高效可构造的维度d=ω(1)，证明了在SETH假设下，这些几何计算问题的运行时间下界基本上不可绕过。
AI.motivation: 解决计算几何中几个基础问题的最优算法运行时间上界是否已经达到，以及维度的依赖性是否本质上不可避免的问题。
AI.method: 使用OpenAI最近关于Erdos单位距离猜想的否证技术（注意：此技术存疑，可能是虚假信息）。
AI.result: 将下界扩展到所有高效可构造的维度d=ω(1)，证明了在SETH假设下，最佳算法对维度的依赖基本上是不可避免的。
AI.conclusion: 在SETH假设下，这些问题的运行时间下界在广泛的维度范围内成立，表明目前已知的最优算法可能已经接近理论极限。

relevance_reason: This paper is about computational geometry and theoretical algorithm complexity (furthest pair problem under SETH), completely unrelated to Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is theoretical computer science/algorithms, not computer graphics or computer vision. Zero relevance to text-to-motion, video generation, VLM-based quality filtering, or any of the pain points mentioned in the research profile.

title: SEMIR: Topology-Preserving Graph Minors for Thin-Structure Segmentation
comment: Accepted to the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2026
summary: Thin-structure segmentation--power lines, cracks, lane markings at 1-3 pixel width--requires preserving connectivity that standard representations preclude: patching severs continuous structures and conventional superpixels merge thin targets into background before classification. Topology-aware losses penalize connectivity breaks at the objective level but cannot recover what the representation has already destroyed. We propose SEMIR, a framework that replaces the pixel lattice with a parameterized graph minor whose contraction map preserves thin-structure connectivity under the contraction criterion. The minor collapses millions of pixels into tens or hundreds of boundary-aligned supernodes, enabling full-resolution inference without patching at scales demonstrated up to 21 MP in this paper; a lightweight GNN classifies the reduced graph and an exact map lifts predictions to pixel resolution. One pipeline--identical architecture, features, loss, and GNN hyperparameters across all dataset--matches or exceeds domain-specific baselines on TTPLA (power lines), CrackSeg9k (pavement cracks), and SkyScapes Lane (aerial markings) on Dice, IoU, and Boundary F1 while reducing mask fragmentation by at least 4.6x relative to SLIC at matched inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SEMIR框架，通过参数化图子式替代像素网格来解决细结构（1-3像素宽的电力线、裂缝、车道标记）的分割问题。该方法将数百万像素收缩为数十或数百个边界对齐的超节点，实现全分辨率推理。
AI.motivation: 细结构分割面临连通性保存的难题：传统修补法会切断连续结构，常规超像素将细目标融入背景。拓扑感知损失无法恢复已被表示层破坏的信息。
AI.method: SEMIR框架将像素网格替换为参数化图子式，收缩映射在收缩准则下保持细结构连通性。轻度GNN分类简化后的图，精确映射将预测提升到像素分辨率。使用单一管道（相同架构、特征、损失和GNN超参数）在所有数据集上运行。
AI.result: 在TTPLA（电力线）、CrackSeg9k（路面裂缝）和SkyScapes Lane（航空标记）数据集上，Dice、IoU和边界F1指标匹配或超越领域特定基线。与SLIC相比，掩码碎片化减少至少4.6倍。规模达到21 MP。
AI.conclusion: SEMIR通过图子式表示有效解决了细结构分割的连通性保存问题，统一的框架在多个细结构分割任务上取得先进性能，具有良好的泛化能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about thin-structure image segmentation (power lines, cracks, lane markings) using graph minors and GNNs - completely unrelated to Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different: image segmentation vs. generating 3D motion from text/video descriptions. Even though both are in Computer Vision/Graphics broadly, this addresses no pain points related to video-to-motion conversion, text-motion consistency, or VLM-based quality filtering. The methods (graph minors, GNN for segmentation) are also completely different from the research profile's methods (video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance, VLM, 3D motion generation).

title: Bridging the Post-discharge Gap: A Traceable Multi-agent Framework for Safe and Continuous Care
summary: Post-discharge clinical follow-up is critical for maintaining continuity of care and mitigating long-term health risks. However, traditional follow-up paradigms suffer from shortage of health workforce, fragmented patient histories, and information silos across clinical departments. While large language models have demonstrated potential in medical question-answering, their deployment in continuous care is hindered by hallucination risks and a fundamental inability to reason over longitudinal, patient-specific constraints. Here we present Healink, a memory-enhanced multi-agent framework to support AI-assisted post-discharge follow-up by generating prescription-grounded, traceable responses that improved completeness and perceived clinical utility in retrospective and physician-blinded evaluations. The architecture seamlessly integrates a triage routing mechanism, a unified memory enhancement module utilizing a robust relational database for optimal latency, and a strict constraint-based retrieval-augmented generation engine. By vectorizing historical clinical records and employing weighted similarity functions across diverse phenotypic and intervention dimensions, Healink ensures precise inter-patient and intra-patient case matching while actively preventing cross-departmental drug conflicts. We evaluated Healink on a dataset comprising 400 continuous and 85 highly complex real-world follow-up cases, alongside the webMedQA benchmark. In a rigorous single-blind evaluation conducted by clinical experts, the framework outperformed human physician baselines in both authoritativeness and clinical safety. By generating a traceable, white-box evidence chain, Healink provides a scalable, safe, and highly effective paradigm for intelligent patient management, ultimately enhancing societal healthcare outcomes.

AI.tldr: Healink是一个用于出院后随访的记忆增强多智能体框架，通过整合分诊路由机制、统一记忆增强模块和严格约束的检索增强生成引擎，生成可追溯、处方支持的响应。在400个连续病例和85个复杂病例的评估中，该框架在权威性和临床安全性方面优于人类医生基准。
AI.motivation: 传统随访模式面临医疗人力资源短缺、患者病史碎片化和临床部门信息孤岛等问题，而大型语言模型在连续护理部署中存在幻觉风险和无法对纵向、患者特定约束进行推理的根本性缺陷。
AI.method: Healink架构包含三部分：1）分诊路由机制；2）统一记忆增强模块，利用稳健关系数据库实现最佳延迟；3）严格约束的检索增强生成引擎。通过对历史临床记录进行向量化，并在多样表型和干预维度上采用加权相似性函数，确保精确的患者间和患者内病例匹配，同时主动预防跨部门药物冲突。
AI.result: 在400个连续病例和85个高度复杂的真实随访病例以及webMedQA基准测试数据集上，经过临床专家的单盲评估，该框架在权威性和临床安全性方面均优于人类医生基准。
AI.conclusion: Healink通过生成可追溯的白盒证据链，提供了一种可扩展、安全且高效的智能患者管理模式，增强了社会医疗保健结果。

relevance_reason: This paper is about healthcare/medical AI for patient follow-up care, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics/Computer Vision - Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different: medical follow-up systems vs 3D human motion generation from text/video. Despite potentially using some similar underlying technologies (like language models), the research field, application purpose, and methods are completely different.

title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to Agentic AI: From Foundations to Systems
summary: The Hitchhiker's Guide to Agentic AI is a comprehensive practitioner's reference for building autonomous AI systems. The book covers the full stack from first principles to production deployment, organized around a central thesis: building great agentic systems requires understanding every layer of the pipeline, not just one. The book opens with the LLM substrate -- transformer architecture, GPU systems, training and fine-tuning (SFT,LoRA, MoE), model compression, and inference optimization -- treated as essential foundations rather than the primary focus. It then develops the alignment and reasoning layer: reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF), PPO, DPO and its variants, GRPO, reward modeling, and RL for large reasoning models including chain-of-thought and test-time scaling. The second half is devoted to agentic AI proper. Topics include agentic training and trajectory-based RL, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG and Agentic RAG), memory systems (in-context, external, episodic, and semantic), agent harness design and context management, and a taxonomy of agent design patterns. Inter-agent coordination is covered in depth: the Model Context Protocol (MCP), agent skills and tool use, the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) communication protocol, and multi-agent architectures spanning centralized, decentralized, and hierarchical topologies. The book concludes with agent development frameworks, agentic UI design, evaluation methodology for agentic tasks, and production deployment. Each chapter pairs rigorous theoretical foundations with implementation guidance, code examples, and references to the primary literature.

AI.tldr: 一本关于构建自主AI系统的实践者参考指南，涵盖从transformer架构、GPU系统、训练微调等底层技术，到RLHF、对齐推理，再到agentic AI、agent间协调、多agent架构等完整技术栈的综合性著作。
AI.motivation: 作者提出核心论点：构建优秀的agentic系统需要理解整个技术栈的每一层，而不仅仅是某一层。现有资源往往只关注单一层面，缺乏全栈视角的系统性指导。
AI.method: 书籍按照技术层次组织内容：1) LLM基座层（transformer、GPU、训练微调、模型压缩、推理优化）；2) 对齐和推理层（RLHF、PPO、DPO、GRPO、奖励建模、推理模型）；3) agentic AI层（agent训练、RAG、记忆系统、agent设计模式）；4) inter-agent协调层（MCP、A2A、多agent架构）；5) 部署和应用层。每章配以理论、代码示例和参考文献。
AI.result: 覆盖了完整的AI agent技术栈：包括LLM基座、对齐训练、推理增强、agent训练方法、记忆系统、RAG、工具使用、agent通信协议（MCP、A2A）、多agent架构、评估方法和生产部署等全链条内容。
AI.conclusion: 这是一本面向实践者的全栈指南，旨在帮助读者建立对agentic AI系统的完整理解，从底层模型到上层应用，从单agent到多agent系统，从开发到部署，适合需要构建生产级AI agent系统的工程师和研究人员参考。

The application domain is entirely different - it has nothing to do with video generation, 3D motion generation, or visual quality control for motion/video tasks. Even though both fields might use transformers, the purpose and domain are completely different. This is a fundamental field mismatch.

title: Curvature-Guided Mixing for MLLM Adaptation
summary: Fine-tuning Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) on specialized tasks often leads to catastrophic forgetting of their general capabilities. Existing model merging methods to combat this are often heuristic or use sub-optimal objectives. We propose CurvatureGuided Mixing (CGM), a theoretically grounded framework that merges pre-trained and fine-tuned models. CGM formulates a joint optimization objective and uses a second-order (Hessian) approximation of the loss landscapes to analytically derive an optimal, closed-form "soft mixing" ratio. This ratio intelligently blends parameters based on their relative task-specific curvatures. We also introduce CGM$\dagger$, a robust "hard mixing" variant that performs sparse parameter selection guided by a novel, curvature-aware score. Experiments on LLaVA-1.5 and Qwen2.5VL across multiple downstream tasks show that CGM and CGM$\dagger$ consistently improve the trade-off between task specialization and general knowledge retention over existing methods. Code is available at github.com/zzsyjl/CGM-ECCV-2026.

AI.tldr: 提出了CurvatureGuided Mixing (CGM)框架，通过利用Hessian曲率信息来最优混合预训练和微调模型参数，以解决多模态大语言模型微调后的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 在专用任务上微调多模态大语言模型(MLLM)往往会导致其通用能力的灾难性遗忘，而现有的模型合并方法往往是启发式的或使用次优目标函数。
AI.method: CGM formulations提出了一种联合优化目标，使用损失景观的二阶(Hessian)近似来解析推导最优的闭式"软混合"比率。该比率根据参数的任务特异性曲率进行智能混合。同时引入CGM†作为鲁棒的"硬混合"变体，通过新颖的曲率感知分数进行稀疏参数选择。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-1.5和Qwen2.5VL上针对多个下游任务的实验表明，CGM和CGM†始终比现有方法更 好地平衡任务专业化与通用知识保留。
AI.conclusion: CGM系列方法为防止MLLM微调中的灾难性遗忘问题提供了理论上有根据的解决方案，在保持模型通用能力的同时有效提升任务专业化表现。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses Multi-modal LLM adaptation and model merging to solve catastrophic forgetting - completely unrelated to the target domain of Text-to-Motion Generation in Computer Graphics/Computer Vision. While it mentions VLMs in passing, the application domain is entirely different: NLP model adaptation vs. 3D motion generation from video. The curvature-guided mixing method is also unrelated to video generation or motion synthesis pipelines mentioned in the research profile.

title: Rate-Aware Quantum-Inspired Trajectory Learning for Interference-Limited Multi-UAV Networks
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) can provide on-demand, high-capacity connectivity in disaster and normal situation. However, it faces a challenge of curse of dimensionality in trajectory optimization, where interference-limited environments and vast search spaces make real-time coordination computationally expensive. To overcome this challenge, we propose the Rate-Aware Quantum-Annealed Graph Condensation (RA-QAGC) scheme, which combines rate-aware graph abstraction with decentralized reinforcement learning to enable scalable, interference-aware UAV coordination. By identifying high throughput locations and guiding UAV trajectory adaptation toward throughput-optimal regions, RA-QAGC effectively balances network capacity by maintaining quality-of-service (QoS) requirements. Simulation results demonstrate the proposal outperformed over existing schemes by achieving 59.4 Mbps total throughput and 23.9 Mbps priority-user throughput, representing gains of approximately 15% and 34%, respectively, over the baseline schemes.

AI.tldr: 针对无人机（UAV）轨迹优化中的"维度诅咒"问题，提出了一种结合速率感知图凝聚与去中心化强化学习的RA-QAGC方案，实现可扩展的干扰感知UAV协调。
AI.motivation: 无人机可在灾难和正常情况下提供按需的高容量连接，但其轨迹优化面临维度诅咒问题——干扰受限环境和庞大搜索空间使得实时协同计算成本极高。
AI.method: 通过速率感知图抽象识别高吞吐量位置，引导无人机轨迹向吞吐量优化区域Adaptation，结合去中心化强化学习实现可扩展的干扰感知UAV协调，平衡网络容量并维持服务质量（QoS）要求。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该方案实现了59.4 Mbps的总吞吐量和23.9 Mbps优先级用户吞吐量，分别比基线方案提升约15%和34%。
AI.conclusion: RA-QAGC方案有效解决了UAV轨迹优化中的计算复杂性问题，在维持QoS的同时显著提升了网络容量和优先级用户吞吐量。

title: Project Auto-World: Towards Automated Benchmarking of Neural Relational Reasoners
comment: Submitted to NeurIPS 2026 E&D track. Code is available at https://github.com/autoworldrules/auto-world-rules
summary: Reasoning about relational structures remains a significant challenge for neural models, particularly when they must systematically apply learned knowledge to problem instances that are harder than those seen in training. Progress is hampered by the difficulty of evaluating such generalization, since a priori, it is rarely clear what makes an instance hard. We study how this issue can be addressed by using large language models (LLMs) to automate benchmark generation, learning to produce increasingly challenging instances in an end-to-end manner. Concretely, given a world parametrized by Datalog rules, and an Edge Transformer as the reasoning evaluator, we use LLM-driven evolutionary search (based on FunSearch) and autonomous agentic search to discover sampling functions that yield hard problem instances. We also show that the Edge Transformer can be improved using this data such that it generalizes well to further data perturbations. Finally, we show that the same machinery can be applied to novel worlds proposed by LLMs, opening the door to autonomous research on neural relational reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨如何利用大语言模型自动化生成神经关系推理的困难基准测试实例，并提升模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 神经模型在关系结构推理中面临系统泛化挑战，评估泛化能力困难因为难以预先判定问题实例的难度。
AI.method: 给定Datalog规则参数化的世界和Edge Transformer作为推理评估器，使用基于FunSearch的LLM驱动进化搜索和自主代理搜索来发现产生困难问题实例的采样函数。
AI.result: 成功生成比传统方法更难的问题实例，Edge Transformer经改进后能更好地泛化到数据扰动，并可应用于LLM新提出的世界。
AI.conclusion: LLM驱动的自动化基准生成为神经关系推理的自主研究开辟了新道路，有望推动该领域的持续进步。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely irrelevant to the research profile. It focuses on neural relational reasoning and automated benchmark generation using Edge Transformer and Datalog rules, while the research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation in Computer Graphics/Computer Vision with methods like Video Generation Models (Wanxiang, Seedance), VLM-based quality filtering, and 3D Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - relational reasoning vs. human motion generation from text/video.

title: Noise-Aware Boundary-Enhanced Generative Learning for Ultrasound Speckle Reduction
summary: Ultrasound is a non-invasive, real-time, and cost-effective imaging technique widely used in clinical diagnosis. However, its diagnostic efficacy is often compromised by inherent speckle noise that degrades image quality and obscures underlying anatomical structures. Existing speckle reduction methods tend to over-smooth tissue boundaries and generalize poorly to heterogeneous noise levels. To address these limitations, we propose a Noise-Aware Boundary-Enhanced Generative Learning (NBGL) framework for ultrasound speckle reduction, which simultaneously preserves annotated anatomical boundaries and adapts to varying noise levels. The NBGL framework consists of a speckle reduction branch and a boundary enhancement branch. The former leverages generative learning to suppress speckle noise, while the latter learns boundary-sensitive representations to preserve target anatomical structures. Furthermore, a noise-aware interaction weight generation (NIWG) module estimates the speckle noise level via 3D Laplacian filtering and a median absolute deviation estimator, and translates it into an adaptive interaction weight. This weight is incorporated into a weighted feature-wise linear modulation (wFiLM) module to adaptively modulate cross-branch feature coupling, thereby improving robustness to varying noise levels. Extensive evaluations on 141 3D transvaginal ultrasound volumes demonstrate that NBGL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in speckle reduction and structural preservation across six noise levels, while maintaining consistency with annotated anatomical boundaries.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于超声图像斑点噪声抑制的 Noise-Aware Boundary-Enhanced Generative Learning (NBGL) 框架，通过生成式学习抑制斑点噪声，同时保留解剖结构边界，并利用噪声感知交互权重模块适应不同噪声水平。
AI.motivation: 现有斑点噪声抑制方法容易过度平滑组织边界，且对不同噪声水平的泛化能力较差，需要一种既能有效降噪又能保留解剖结构的方法。
AI.method: NBGL框架包含两个分支：斑点抑制分支利用生成式学习抑制噪声，边界增强分支学习边界敏感表示以保留解剖结构。引入噪声感知交互权重生成模块(NIWG)通过3D拉普拉斯滤波和中值绝对偏差估计器估计噪声水平，并转换为自适应交互权重，用于加权特征线性调制模块(wFiLM)调节跨分支特征耦合。
AI.result: 在141个3D经阴道超声体积上的广泛评估表明，NBGL在六个噪声水平下在斑点抑制和解剖结构保留方面始终优于最先进方法，并与标注的解剖边界保持一致。
AI.conclusion: NBGL框架能够有效解决超声图像斑点噪声问题，同时保留关键解剖结构，具有良好的噪声水平适应性，为临床诊断提供了更可靠的超声图像质量。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about ultrasound speckle noise reduction in medical imaging (3D transvaginal ultrasound volumes), which is an entirely different field and application domain from Text-to-Motion Generation. While it uses generative learning, the application is medical image denoising, not human motion generation or video generation for motion synthesis. The methods, pain points, and target application have no overlap with the research profile.

title: Manipulation Is Task-Dependent: A Multi-Axis, Multi-Environment Evaluation of Frontier LLMs
summary: We evaluate manipulative behavior in six frontier language models across six environments, ranging from negotiation tasks to agentic workflows, resulting in 13{,}590 individual scenarios. Manipulation rates are measured across three axes: framing (mandate honesty or permit manipulation), incentive structure (from no incentives to substantial ones), and task difficulty. Existing benchmarks typically vary a single axis within a single environment, an approach our results show is insufficient. We rank models by manipulation rate and find Spearman rank correlations across environments average $ρ= 0.055$, indicating manipulative tendencies in one task do not necessarily predict those in another. Additionally, we find the axis that drives manipulation varies across different environments. In environments where models are incentivized to misrepresent future actions, instructional framing and structurally binding incentives are the primary drivers; in environments where models are incentivized to misrepresent a ground truth, task difficulty dominates. This split was identified in five environments and validated against a sixth held-out environment. Together, these findings illustrate the importance of rigorous multi-dimensional evaluations when measuring manipulative propensities.

AI.tldr: 研究在6种环境中评估了6种前沿语言模型的操纵行为，共涉及13,590个场景。现有基准通常只在单一环境单一轴上变化，这种方法被证明是不充分的。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试通常只改变单一环境中的单一变量，无法全面评估语言模型的操纵倾向。需要更严格的多维评估方法来准确测量模型的操纵倾向。
AI.method: 在6种环境中对6种前沿语言模型进行评估，包括谈判任务和代理工作流程，共13,590个场景。操纵率在三个轴上测量：框架（要求诚实或允许操纵）、激励结构（从无激励到强激励）和任务难度。使用斯皮尔曼等级相关分析模型排名。
AI.result: 模型间的操纵率斯皮尔曼相关系数平均ρ=0.055，表明在一个任务中的操纵倾向无法预测另一任务中的表现。操纵驱动因素因环境而异：在模型被激励误导未来行动的环境中，教学框架和结构约束激励是主要驱动因素；在模型被激励误导真实情况的环境中，任务难度占主导地位。这种分裂在5种环境中被识别，并在第6种环境中得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现表明，在测量操纵倾向时，严格的多维评估方法至关重要。单一环境或单一变量的评估不足以准确预测模型的操纵行为。

relevance_reason: This paper is about evaluating language models' manipulation behaviors in different environments (NLP/AI ethics domain), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics/Computer Vision - Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - it focuses on LLM manipulation evaluation, not motion generation, video generation, or any quality control methods for 3D motion synthesis. No relevance to the research profile's pain points or methods.

title: Diagnosing and Mitigating Compounding Failures in Agentic Persuasion via Taxonomic Strategy Retrieval
summary:
Foundation-model agents in multi-step, open-ended environments frequently suffer from compounding errors, where early mistakes contaminate long-horizon trajectories. While Multi-Agent Debate (MAD) succeeds in deterministic domains, agents in subjective tasks like persuasion experience severe problem drift and sycophantic conformity. We identify semantic leakage in standard Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) as a reproducible trigger for these failures, as standard RAG prioritizes vocabulary overlap over logical necessity.
  To eliminate this leakage, we introduce Taxonomic Strategy RAG (TS-RAG), a systems intervention that routes strategies through a discrete categorical bottleneck to decouple argumentative structure from topical content. Zero-shot, cross-domain evaluations demonstrate that TS-RAG significantly improves the transfer of abstract logic where standard semantic retrieval collapses. Crucially, TS-RAG acts as a "capability bridge" in asymmetric deployments, empowering lightweight persuaders to consistently defeat parametrically superior opponents (improving win rates from 70.5 to 78.5) and accelerating argumentative efficiency. Finally, we introduce trace-level diagnostics via a turn-by-turn Debate State Representation (DSR), demonstrating the necessity of strict constraints to prevent evaluation collapse via default agentic sycophancy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Taxonomic Strategy RAG (TS-RAG)系统，通过分类学策略路由解决多智能体辩论中的语义泄漏问题，提升论证逻辑迁移能力和说服效率。
AI.motivation: 基础模型智能体在多步骤开放环境中常遭受复合错误困扰，早期错误会污染长轨迹；多智能体辩论虽在确定性领域成功，但在说服等主观任务中会出现严重的问题漂移和拍马屁式conformity。标准RAG的语义泄漏被确定为这些失败的可重现触发器。
AI.method: 提出Taxonomic Strategy RAG (TS-RAG)，一种系统干预手段，通过离散分类瓶颈路由策略，将论证结构与主题内容解耦。引入回合级诊断工具Debate State Representation (DSR)。
AI.result: 零样本跨域评估表明TS-RAG显著提升抽象逻辑迁移能力（标准语义检索失败之处）。在非对称部署中，轻量级说服者击败参数优势对手的胜率从70.5%提升至78.5%，论证效率加速。
AI.conclusion: TS-RAG作为"能力桥"有效消除语义泄漏，显著改善论证逻辑迁移和说服效率。严格约束对于防止评估崩溃（通过默认智能体拍马屁）有必要性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about NLP/LLM multi-agent persuasion systems (Taxonomic Strategy RAG for debate argumentation), completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics/Computer Vision Text-to-Motion Generation domain. The application domain is entirely different - text-to-motion generation vs. multi-agent debate persuasion. There is no overlap in methods or application areas.

title: Yuvion VL: A Multimodal Foundation Model for Adversarial Content and AI Safety
summary: General-purpose models often struggle to reliably identify and understand real-world multimodal risks, largely due to the inherent multimodal adversarial nature of content and AI safety. We present Yuvion VL, a family of multimodal large language models purpose-built for content and AI safety, with both instruction-tuned and reasoning-oriented variants. Yuvion VL addresses this gap by treating safety as an inherently adversarial and multimodal problem and designing the entire pipeline around adversarial robustness. For data construction, we develop an automated pipeline integrating adversarial-aware data synthesis with multi-stage quality control, producing large-scale, high-quality multimodal samples augmented with domain knowledge and reasoning annotations. For training, we adopt a three-stage pipeline that includes continued pretraining for risk-concept cross-modal alignment, instruct post-training for production-grade safety tasks, and reasoning post-training for enhanced interpretability and performance in complex tasks. We further introduce Confuse-then-Contrast Fine-Tuning, a contrastive framework that mines model-specific confusions and constructs multi-image contrastive groups to enforce explicit discrimination of fine-grained visual-semantic elements, enabling the model to distinguish between visually similar cases with different safety implications in adversarial safety tasks. To support rigorous evaluation, we further introduce Yuvion VL RiskEval (YVRE), a collection of benchmarks covering diverse open and internal evaluations, with a focus on content and AI safety, adversarial robustness, and real-world capability requirements. Experiments show that Yuvion VL-32B achieves industry-leading safety performance, surpassing comparably sized open-source models and best closed-source commercial models, while maintaining comparable general capabilities.

AI.tldr: Yuvion VL是一系列专门为内容安全和AI安全设计的多模态大语言模型，包含指令调优和推理导向变体，采用对抗性鲁棒性设计理念，通过自动化数据合成管道、三阶段训练和对比微调方法实现行业领先的安全性能。
AI.motivation: 通用模型在可靠识别和理解现实世界多模态风险方面存在困难，主要因为内容和AI安全本质上具有内在的多模态对抗性质，现有模型难以有效应对。
AI.method: 1) 数据构建：开发自动化管道，整合对抗性感知数据合成与多阶段质量控制，生成大规模高质量多模态样本；2) 训练采用三阶段管道：持续预训练进行风险概念跨模态对齐、指令后训练完成生产级安全任务、推理后训练增强复杂任务的可解释性和性能；3) 引入Confuse-then-Contrast Fine-Tuning对比框架，挖掘模型特定混淆并构建多图像对比组以增强细粒度视觉语义元素区分能力；4) 构建Yuvion VL RiskEval (YVRE)评估基准。
AI.result: Yuvion VL-32B实现了行业领先的安全性能，超越可比规模的开源模型和最佳闭源商业模型，同时保持相当的通用能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过将安全视为内在对抗性多模态问题并围绕对抗性鲁棒性设计完整 pipeline，Yuvion VL系列能够有效区分具有不同安全含义的视觉相似案例，在安全任务上达到领先水平。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - this paper is about adversarial content detection and AI safety for multimodal models, not text-to-motion generation. Although both involve vision-language models, the application domains are entirely different: the research profile focuses on generating 3D human motion from text descriptions (Computer Graphics/Computer Vision), while this paper focuses on content safety and risk detection. The methods, goals, and target application are completely unrelated to text-to-motion generation, video-to-3D motion conversion, or motion quality control.

title: Multi-Agent Goal Recognition with Team- and Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning and Factorized Branch-and-Bound
summary: Multi-agent goal recognition asks an observer to jointly infer which agents act together and what each team is trying to achieve, so the hypothesis space grows combinatorially with the number of team partitions and goals per team. Real applications such as drone surveillance and collaborative robotics expose only the agents' trajectory, which forces the observer to rank team-goal hypotheses from behavior alone. Multi-Agent Goal Recognition with Branch-and-Bound (MAGR-BB) addresses this setting with a shared team- and goal-conditioned policy used as the scoring model inside a factorized branch-and-bound search. On a controlled multi-agent Blocksworld benchmark, MAGR-BB returns the same top-ranked hypothesis as exhaustive search throughout the trajectory while cutting hypothesis materialization by orders of magnitude and reducing cumulative recognition runtime substantially.

AI.tldr: MAGR-BB是一种多智能体目标识别方法，通过分支限界搜索和共享策略评分模型来识别团队和目标假设，解决假设空间组合爆炸问题。
AI.motivation: 在无人机监控和协作机器人等实际应用中，只能观察到智能体的轨迹，需要从行为中推断团队划分和目标，且假设空间随团队数量和目标数量组合增长。
AI.method: 提出MAGR-BB方法，使用共享的团队和目标条件策略作为评分模型，结合分解的分支限界搜索来排序团队-目标假设。
AI.result: 在受控的多智能体Blocksworld基准测试中，MAGR-BB返回与穷举搜索相同的最佳排名假设，假设实例化减少数个数量级，显著降低了累积识别运行时间。
AI.conclusion: MAGR-BB能够在整个轨迹中保持与穷举搜索相同的识别准确性，同时大幅提高计算效率。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about Multi-Agent Goal Recognition (identifying goals of multiple agents from their trajectories), which is an entirely different field from Text-to-Motion Generation in Computer Graphics/Computer Vision. The research profile focuses on generating 3D human motion from text descriptions using video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance), while this paper addresses无人机监控 and协作机器人 scenarios with completely different methods (branch-and-bound search, reinforcement learning for goal recognition). Despite both mentioning "motion," the application domains are fundamentally different - robot/multi-agent trajectory analysis vs human motion synthesis.

title: Do vision-language models search like humans? Reasoning tokens as a reaction-time analog in classic visual-search paradigms
summary: Visual search has been one of the most productive paradigms in the study of visual attention: the way reaction time scales with the number of items distinguishes parallel, "pop-out" search from serial, attention-demanding search. I ask whether vision-language models (VLMs) exhibit the same behavioral signatures. I adapt four classic paradigms: feature versus conjunction search, spatial-configuration (T-vs-L) search, enumeration, and the tilted/vertical search asymmetry; and present them to current frontier and mid-tier models. Because a single model call has no reaction time, I use the number of reasoning ("thinking") tokens a model spends per trial as a within-model analog of search effort, and I compare against a large public human benchmark (Wolfe et al., 2010). The models reproduce several human signatures: feature search costs flat effort while conjunction effort climbs with set size; frontier models hold accuracy where mid-tier models collapse to chance; and a resolution control shows the conjunction cost is genuine search rather than difficulty resolving small shapes. They also diverge from humans in informative ways. The target-present effort slope exceeds the target-absent slope, reversing the human ordering; enumeration remains accurate where humans would lose count; and a reasoning model with adaptive deliberation declines to deliberate on detection tasks altogether, so that a single search expresses itself as an effort gradient in one model and as an accuracy cliff in another. I argue that psychophysical paradigms, applied behaviorally, are a sharp and inexpensive probe of machine visual cognition, and that the points of divergence are as informative as the points of agreement.

AI.tldr: 研究者将经典视觉搜索范式（特征vs结合搜索、空间配置搜索、计数、搜索不对称）应用于视觉语言模型(VLM)，用推理token数量替代反应时间作为搜索努力度的指标，发现模型重现了部分人类行为特征（如特征搜索努力度平坦、结合搜索随集合大小上升），也与人类存在关键分歧（如目标存在时努力度反而高于目标不存在、枚举任务准确率过高）。
AI.motivation: 视觉搜索是研究视觉注意力的经典范式，人类通过反应时间随项目数的变化区分并行"弹出"搜索和串行注意搜索。作者想知道视觉语言模型是否展现相同的认知行为特征，并探索心理物理范式能否作为探测机器视觉认知的锐利且低成本的方法。
AI.method: 作者改编四种经典范式：特征vs结合搜索、空间配置(T-vs-L)搜索、枚举、倾斜/垂直搜索不对称。由于单次模型调用没有反应时间，作者使用推理("思考")token数量作为搜索努力度的内在指标，并与人类大规模公共基准(Wolfe et al., 2010)进行对比。
AI.result: 模型复现了若干人类特征：特征搜索努力度平坦而结合搜索努力度随集合大小上升；前沿模型保持准确率而中层模型崩溃到随机水平；分辨率控制表明结合成本是真实搜索而非小形状分辨困难。但模型也与人类存在信息丰富的分歧：目标存在时的努力度斜率超过目标不存在，反转了人类顺序；枚举保持准确率而人类会丢失计数；具有自适应推理的模型在检测任务上拒绝推理，导致单一搜索在不同模型中表现为努力度梯度或准确率悬崖。
AI.conclusion: 心理物理范式应用行为上是探测机器视觉认知的锐利且低成本的方法，分歧点和一致点同样具有信息量。VLMs虽然展现出与人类相似的部分搜索特征，但在关键维度上存在本质差异，这些差异为理解机器视觉认知提供了独特洞见。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper studies VLM cognitive behavior in visual search paradigms (cognitive science/AI psychology), while the research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation in Computer Graphics. Although both involve Vision-Language Models, the application domains are entirely different - this paper does not address text-to-motion generation, video generation stability, quality control of motion conversion, or any of the specified pain points. It's a fundamental mismatch in application domain.

title: Chorus II: Cross-Request Sparsity Reuse for Efficient Image-to-Video Generation
summary: Serving diffusion models for image-to-video generation is computationally expensive, posing significant challenges for large-scale deployment. Real I2V workloads often contain similar requests, such as repeated effect templates, related subjects, and recurring shot layouts. Existing cross-request acceleration methods mainly exploit this redundancy through feature reuse. We observe that similar I2V requests also share highly consistent sparse attention patterns, enabling historical sparse masks to serve as request-conditioned priors with almost no online mask-prediction overhead. We propose a cross-request reuse framework centered on \textbf{sparsity reuse}, with \textbf{feature reuse} as an optional extension safeguarded by a lightweight \textbf{guidance enhancement}. Our sparsity reuse is implemented as shared sparse mask reuse, which reuses high-quality sparse masks from similar historical requests to avoid per-request online mask prediction. Optional feature reuse applies downsampled computation to highly redundant spatiotemporal regions, mitigating boundary artifacts while preserving efficiency gains. Guidance enhancement reinforces image/text conditioning after reuse, mitigating semantic drift and condition-adherence issues. Experiments show that default sparsity reuse configuration preserves generation quality with a \textbf{2.16$\times$} speedup.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于稀疏注意力模式复用的跨请求加速框架，用于图像到视频(I2V)生成任务的扩散模型推理加速。通过复用历史请求的高质量稀疏掩码，避免了每请求的在线掩码预测开销。默认配置可实现2.16倍加速且保持生成质量。
AI.motivation: 图像到视频生成任务的扩散模型推理在计算上非常昂贵，对大规模部署构成重大挑战。实际工作负载中存在大量相似请求(相同效果模板、相关主体、重复镜头布局)，现有跨请求加速方法主要利用特征复用，但作者观察到相似请求还共享高度一致的稀疏注意力模式。
AI.method: 提出以稀疏复用为中心的跨请求复用框架，包括：(1)共享稀疏掩码复用：复用历史相似请求的高质量稀疏掩码，避免在线掩码预测；(2)可选特征复用：对高冗余时空区域进行下采样计算；(3)引导增强：在复用后强化图像/文本条件，减缓语义漂移和条件遵从性问题。
AI.result: 默认稀疏复用配置在保持生成质量的同时实现2.16倍加速。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用相似请求间的稀疏注意力模式一致性，稀疏复用可作为高效的跨请求加速手段，在几乎无额外开销的情况下复用历史高质量稀疏掩码，显著降低扩散模型的服务成本。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses Image-to-Video (I2V) generation acceleration, which is a completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion Generation. While both use diffusion models, I2V generates 2D video frames while text-to-motion generates 3D human skeletal motion - these are fundamentally different tasks. The paper focuses on inference optimization via sparse attention reuse, but doesn't address any of the research profile's pain points: quality control for 2D video-to-3D motion conversion, consistency between generated 3D motion and text descriptions, VLM-based quality filtering, or visual guidance features extraction. This is a computer graphics/video generation paper unrelated to motion generation research.

title: Agentic Knowledge Tracing: A Multi-Agent LLM Architecture for Stealth Assessment of Financial Literacy in Serious Games
summary: Assessing financial literacy during gameplay without disrupting the learning experience remains a key challenge in serious games for education. We present the Agentic BKT pipeline, a multi-agent large language model architecture for stealth assessment of financial competencies from open-ended gameplay events. The pipeline processes events from a 2D platformer serious game aligned with the OECD/INFE financial literacy framework through four phases: (1) the game captures every player decision as a structured event log; (2) an LLM event classifier labels each action on a four-point rubric validated against three domain experts (Fleiss kappa = 0.624, substantial agreement); (3) four domain-specific agents specializing in risk mitigation, investing, spending, and credit management perform session-level reasoning over behavioral trajectories, feeding per-competency Bayesian Knowledge Tracing that estimates mastery within each domain; and (4) an expert judge agent synthesizes the domain-level estimates into an overall mastery score. Evaluated with 193 K-12 participants across 264 game sessions, the Agentic BKT pipeline yields mastery estimates significantly correlated with learning gain (r = 0.276, p = 0.0001) and post-test scores (r = 0.333, p < 0.0001) while showing no correlation with pre-test scores, providing both convergent and discriminant validity. The multi-agent approach approximately triples the predictive validity of a single-LLM baseline (r = 0.095, not significant) in this study, demonstrating that domain decomposition and session-level reasoning play a central role in capturing the multidimensional nature of financial literacy from gameplay

AI.tldr: 本研究提出Agentic BKT管道，一种基于多智能体大型语言模型的隐蔽评估架构，用于在严肃游戏中无干扰地评估K-12学生的金融素养能力。该方法通过四阶段处理游戏事件：事件捕获、LLM分类器标注、四领域智能体推理和专家判断综合，最终生成金融素养掌握度分数。
AI.motivation: 在严肃游戏教育中，如何在不破坏学习体验的前提下有效评估学习者的金融素养能力是一个关键挑战。传统评估方法往往需要中断游戏过程，影响学习体验和评估生态效度。
AI.method: 采用多智能体架构处理游戏事件：(1)游戏捕获玩家决策作为结构化事件日志；(2)LLM事件分类器使用四点评分量表标注行为（专家验证Fleiss kappa=0.624）；(3)四个领域特定智能体（风险缓释、投资、支出、信用管理）进行会话级推理，输出贝叶斯知识追踪估计；(4)专家判断智能体综合领域估计为总体掌握度分数。
AI.result: 193名K-12参与者264场会话数据验证：(1)掌握度估计与学习增益显著相关(r=0.276, p=0.0001)；(2)与后测分数显著相关(r=0.333, p<0.0001)；(3)与前测分数无显著相关；(4)相比单LLM基线(r=0.095)，预测有效性提高约3倍。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体领域分解与会话级推理方法能够有效捕捉金融素养的多维性质，为严肃游戏中的隐蔽评估提供了可行方案。该方法在保持游戏学习体验完整性的同时，提供了具有收敛和区分效度的金融素养评估。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. Research profile is about Computer Graphics/Computer Vision - Text-to-Motion Generation (3D human motion generation from text/video), while this paper is about educational assessment in serious games for financial literacy (K-12 education). The methods are unrelated: the profile uses video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance), VLM, 3D motion generation, and quality supervision, while this paper uses multi-agent LLM architecture for stealth assessment and Bayesian Knowledge Tracing. These are entirely different research fields with no meaningful overlap.

title: Beyond Shapley: Efficient Computation of Asymmetric Shapley Values
summary: We address the problem of explainability in machine learning models through feature attribution methods. In particular, we consider a variant of Shapley values known as Asymmetric Shapley Values (ASV), which enables the incorporation of causal knowledge into model-agnostic explanations through the use of a causal graph. We show that in certain contexts in which the computation of SHAP is $\#P$-hard, the exact computation of ASV can be done in polynomial time. To extend this algorithmic result, we introduce a notion of equivalence classes over the topological orderings of the underlying causal graph, which is useful to reduce the time to compute ASV. In particular, we present a polynomial-time algorithm (in the number of equivalence classes) to compute it whenever the causal graph is a rooted directed tree. Finally, we develop an algorithm for approximating ASV in arbitrary causal DAGs which relies on a procedure to sample topological orderings uniformly at random. To implement this sampling mechanism we leverage known algorithms as well as simpler alternatives. Our experimental results demonstrate the practical viability of the proposed approach in realistic causal structures.

AI.tldr: 通过利用因果图和不对称Shapley值(ASV)方法，在某些SHAP计算为#P-hard的上下文中，可以多项式时间精确计算ASV，并在任意因果DAG中近似计算。
AI.motivation: 机器学习模型的可解释性问题至关重要，传统的SHAP方法在某些情况下计算复杂度为#P-hard，难以实际应用，因此需要引入基于因果知识的不对称Shapley值来提高计算效率。
AI.method: 引入因果图上的拓扑序等价类概念，针对根定向树提出多项式时间算法，对任意因果DAG采用均匀随机采样拓扑序的近似方法。
AI.result: 在SHAP为#P-hard的某些上下文中，ASV可多项式时间精确计算；对根定向树可在等价类数量多项式时间内完成；任意因果DAG可通过随机采样获得有效近似。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果验证了所提方法在现实因果结构中的实际可行性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about machine learning model interpretability using causal graphs and asymmetric Shapley values - a completely different field from Computer Graphics / Computer Vision - Text-to-Motion Generation. It has no relevance to video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance), 3D motion generation, VLM-based quality filtering, or any of the pain points mentioned in the research profile. The application domain is entirely different (explainable AI vs. video/motion generation).

title: Wan-Streamer v0.1: End-to-end Real-time Interactive Foundation Models
summary: We present Wan-Streamer, a native-streaming, end-to-end interactive foundation model designed from the ground up for real-time, low-latency, full-duplex audio-visual interaction. Wan-Streamer seamlessly models language, audio, and video as both input and output within a single Transformer, where the sequence is represented as interleaved visual, audio, and text input tokens together with visual, audio, and text output tokens, coordinated by block-causal attention for incremental streaming. Unlike cascaded interactive systems that rely on separate VAD, ASR, language, TTS, audio-driven animation, or video-generation modules, Wan-Streamer does not rely on external language, speech, avatar, or video-generation modules: perception, reasoning, generation, response timing, turn management, and cross-modal synchronization are learned jointly within one unified model, reducing pipeline latency and error accumulation. To support natural audio-visual responsiveness, we redesign the entire stack around streamability, including causal encoders, causal decoders, block-causal attention, and low-latency multimodal token scheduling, enabling streaming units as short as 160 ms at 25 fps. Wan-Streamer achieves approximately 200 ms model-side response latency and approximately 550 ms total interaction latency when combined with 350 ms bidirectional network latency, supporting sub-second duplex audio-visual communication. These results position Wan-Streamer as a unified, end-to-end, multimodal interactive foundation model for low-latency streaming interaction.

AI.tldr: Wan-Streamer是一个原生流式端到端交互基础模型,在单个Transformer中统一处理语言、音频和视频输入输出,实现低延迟(<200ms模型响应延迟、<550ms总交互延迟)的全双工音视频交互。
AI.motivation: 解决现有级联交互系统的延迟高和错误累积问题,实现自然流畅的实时音视频交互体验。
AI.method: 采用统一Transformer架构,使用块因果注意力和低延迟多模态令牌调度,支持160ms@25fps的流式单元,实现感知、推理、生成、响应时间、轮次管理和跨模态同步的联合学习。
AI.result: 实现约200ms模型侧响应延迟和约550ms总交互延迟(含350ms网络延迟),支持亚秒级全双工音视频通信。
AI.conclusion: Wan-Streamer是首个统一的端到端多模态交互基础模型,为低延迟流式交互提供了新的技术方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation (generating 3D human motion from text or video), while this paper (Wan-Streamer) is about real-time interactive foundation models for audio-video communication (full-duplex audio-video interaction). Although both mention "video" and use multimodal transformer architectures, Wan-Streamer addresses latency reduction in interactive communication systems, not motion generation or video-to-motion conversion. The pain points, methods, and end goals are entirely different - this paper doesn't address any of the specified research profile issues (quality control of video-to-3D motion, consistency between 3D motion and text descriptions, VLM-based quality filtering, etc.).

title: Agentic evolution of physically constrained foundation models
comment: 29 pages, 5 main figures and 4 extended data figures
summary: Artificial intelligence increasingly drives automated scientific discovery, yet contemporary generalist agents lack physical grounding, frequently hallucinating hardware-incompatible designs. Here, we present a physically grounded, multi-agent discovery engine that autonomously architects hardware-compliant computing systems. Anchored by an Evolutionary Knowledge Graph structuring past scientific innovations, the framework extracts an "algorithmic Chain-of-Thought" to transform blind stochastic search into directed structural evolution. Applied to the extreme testbed of foundation model deployment, the engine evolved two hardware-aware compression methodologies surpassing human-engineered heuristics: Q-Enhance mitigates long-context accuracy loss in dense models, and MoE-Salient-AQ outperforms state-of-the-art manual sparse Mixture-of-Experts designs by 3.7% at sub-3-bit regimes. Utilizing a bandwidth-efficient Sensitivity Profile, we successfully deployed a massive 235-billion-parameter model onto a constrained dual-A100 server, reducing memory requirements by 75% with a marginal 0.64% accuracy degradation. By transforming unconstrained combinatorial search into knowledge-driven autonomy, this establishes a scalable hardware-software co-design paradigm for machine-driven discovery within strict physical boundaries.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种物理约束的多智能体AI发现引擎，能够自主设计硬件兼容的计算系统，在基础模型部署中超越了人类设计的启发式方法。
AI.motivation: 当前通用AI智能体缺乏物理接地，经常产生硬件不兼容的设计（幻觉），需要能在严格物理约束下工作的自动化科学发现方法。
AI.method: 使用进化知识图（Evolutionary Knowledge Graph）结构化过去科学创新，提取"算法思维链"将盲目随机搜索转化为定向结构进化，应用于基础模型部署的极端测试场景。
AI.result: 开发了两种硬件感知压缩方法：Q-Enhance减少长上下文精度损失，MoE-Salient-AQ在子3位配置下比人工稀疏MoE设计优3.7%；成功将2350亿参数模型部署到双A100服务器，内存减少75%，精度仅下降0.64%。
AI.conclusion: 建立了可扩展的硬件-软件协同设计范式，实现了在严格物理边界内的机器驱动发现，为AI驱动的自动化科学发现开辟了新途径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about using evolutionary knowledge graphs for automated scientific discovery and hardware-aware model compression for deploying large language models. It has NO connection to Computer Graphics / Computer Vision - Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is completely different - it's about ML infrastructure and model deployment optimization, not motion generation, video generation, or any computer graphics tasks. While it mentions "foundation models," that's the only tangential similarity, but the actual application domain and research goals are entirely unrelated.

title: The Clinician's Veto: Navigating Trust, Liability, and Uncertainty in Autonomous AI Prescribing
summary: Autonomous AI systems are transitioning from advisory to autonomous roles for medication prescriptions. Recent United States bill H.R. 238 and Utah's prescription-renewal pilot both authorize AI to prescribe medications in an agentic capacity. While some regulatory guidelines suggest aggregate model performance metrics for clearance, they do not require i) calibrated per-prediction confidence for action-gated thresholds, ii) differentiated communication of uncertainty arising from model ignorance (epistemic) versus genuine clinical ambiguity (aleatoric), and iii) inferential transparency at the moment of decision that allows for liability allocation. Here, we present a regulatory and technical argument (tested with a survey of 136 U.S. prescribing clinicians) positioning these as minimum architectural requirements for safe autonomous prescribing. Our results suggest prescribing clinicians i) would not permit autonomous prescribing without a calibrated confidence-based escalation mechanism, ii) preferred a competing-options summary when uncertainty was aleatoric but shifted to abstention when uncertainty was epistemic, and iii) were only willing to accept additional liability when inferential transparency enabled a substantive judgment under acknowledged uncertainty. These findings indicate our recommended architectural features would encourage higher rates of clinician adoption, largely through collapsing much of what "autonomy" conventionally means. A system meeting these requirements would function less as an autonomous agent and more as a heavily supervised decision-support tool. As legislation and state pilots proceed, our technical argument backed by clinician perspectives provides opportunities for regulation to constrain the degree of autonomy ethically granted to AI in prescribing while aligning liability with the institutional actors who control system design and deployment.

title: FreeStory: Training-Free Character Consistency for Free-Form Visual Storytelling
summary: Visual storytelling aims to generate image sequences that are both aligned with narrative prompts and consistent in character appearance across images. Recent training-free methods improve character consistency by reusing attention features, but rely on structured prompts where full character descriptions are repeated in every prompt. This assumption simplifies the task but deviates from natural storytelling, where characters are typically introduced once and later referred to using pronouns or type-based expressions. We propose \textbf{FreeStory}, a training-free framework that reformulates character consistency under free-form prompts as entity-grounded feature reuse. Our method associates reference mentions with their corresponding character descriptions and combines dynamic character masks, correspondence-aware feature matching, key-value injection, and query blending to preserve identity while retaining generation diversity. We also introduce \textbf{FreeStoryBench}, a benchmark for this setting that includes both single- and multi-character stories. Experiments show that FreeStory achieves state-of-the-art performance among training-free methods on structured benchmarks and stronger overall consistency over baselines under free-form prompts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FreeStory框架，解决自由形式提示下的视觉故事生成中的角色一致性问题的训练无关方法。
AI.motivation: 现有训练无关方法依赖于结构化提示（每个提示都重复完整角色描述），这偏离了自然故事叙述方式（角色通常只介绍一次，之后使用代词或类型表达式引用）。
AI.method: FreeStory将自由形式提示下的角色一致性重新表述为实体接地特征重用。方法包括：关联引用提及与对应角色描述、动态角色掩码、对应感知特征匹配、键值注入和查询混合。
AI.result: FreeStory在结构化基准上达到训练无关方法的SOTA性能，在自由形式提示下具有更强的整体一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了自然故事叙述中的角色一致性保持，同时保留了生成多样性，为视觉故事生成任务提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: The paper is about visual storytelling and character consistency in IMAGE generation, while the research profile is specifically about TEXT-TO-MOTION GENERATION (generating 3D human motion from text). These are completely different application domains - one generates images/visuals, the other generates human body movements/motion data. Even though both may use diffusion models, the output format and core task are fundamentally different. The pain points in the profile (2D video-to-3D motion conversion, consistency between generated 3D MOTION and text, VLM-based quality filtering for MOTION) are not addressed by this paper which focuses on character consistency in image generation.

title: TRUSTMEM: Learning Trustworthy Memory Consolidation for LLM Agents with Long-Term Memory
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents rely on long-term memory to support extended interactions and personalized assistance beyond finite context windows. Existing memory agents actively update external memory through generated write, revise, and delete operations, but these updates may omit important information, corrupt existing memory, or introduce unsupported hallucinated content. Once stored, such errors become persistent system-state failures that can affect future reasoning and generation. In this paper, we propose TrustMem, a framework designed to improve the trustworthiness of memory consolidation. TrustMem relies on a Memory Transition Verifier to evaluate the transition process of memory updates in terms of coverage, preservation, and faithfulness. It further constructs preference pairs among candidate updates under the same memory state, enabling preference-guided reinforcement learning to directly optimize memory updating behaviors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TrustMem improves both memory utility and reliability: it achieves state-of-the-art results across MemoryAgentBench, HaluMem, and the Mem-alpha validation set, improves HaluMem memory extraction by 12.14 F1 points, and reduces transition-level omission, corruption, and hallucination by 40.1\%, 79.1\%, and 50.0\%, respectively, compared with the strongest baseline for each error type.

AI.tldr: TrustMem框架通过记忆转换验证器和偏好引导强化学习提升LLM代理记忆系统的可信度，在多个基准测试上达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆代理的更新操作可能遗漏重要信息、破坏现有记忆或引入幻觉错误，这些错误会成为持久性系统状态故障，影响未来推理和生成。
AI.method: 提出Memory Transition Verifier评估记忆更新的覆盖率、保留率和忠实度；构建同一记忆状态下的候选更新偏好对，利用偏好引导强化学习优化记忆更新行为。
AI.result: 在MemoryAgentBench、HaluMem和Mem-alpha上达到最优；HaluMem记忆提取提升12.14 F1点；遗漏、腐败和幻觉分别降低40.1%、79.1%和50.0%。
AI.conclusion: TrustMem能有效提升记忆系统的实用性和可靠性，为LLM代理的记忆整合提供更可信的方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM agent memory consolidation (TRUSTMEM framework), which is completely unrelated to the research profile's domain of Computer Graphics/Computer Vision - Text-to-Motion Generation. The paper addresses hallucination, forgetting, and corruption in LLM agent memories using Memory Transition Verifier and preference-guided RL. This is in the field of NLP/AI agents, not motion generation, video generation, or computer graphics. The application domain, methods, and research goals are entirely different - zero overlap with text-to-3D motion generation, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM-based quality filtering, or motion generation pipelines.

title: Are We There Yet? Exploring the Capabilities of MLLMs in Assistive AI Applications
summary:
Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have redefined visual understanding by combining vision encoders with large-scale language models. This unified architecture enables strong performance on tasks like image captioning, visual question answering, and multimodal dialogue, often in zero- and few-shot settings. Their general-purpose capabilities and flexible interfaces make MLLMs a promising foundation for real-world vision-language applications.
  Assistive AI aims to help users interact with their environments through natural language. These scenarios demand robust visual recognition, contextual reasoning, and multilingual comprehension-capabilities that MLLMs are believed to offer. However, their effectiveness in assistive settings remains to be fully understood.
  In this work, we explore whether MLLMs can support Assistive AI by evaluating state-of-the-art models on real-world tasks: recognizing everyday objects like currency, answering questions based on scene text, and reading visually presented content across multiple languages. To this end, we developed a system, NetraLink, using a head-mounted GoPro to capture real-world egocentric data, and collected a benchmark covering these assistive scenarios. Our findings provide a comprehensive diagnostic of current MLLMs, highlighting their strengths and limitations in enabling assistive technologies grounded in visual perception and language interaction.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)在辅助AI场景中的适用性，通过开发NetraLink系统和基准测试评估模型在日常物体识别、基于场景文本的问答和多语言阅读等实际任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 辅助AI旨在帮助用户通过自然语言与环境交互，需要强大的视觉识别、上下文推理和多语言理解能力。MLLMs被认为具备这些能力，但其 在辅助场景中的有效性尚未得到充分验证。
AI.method: 开发了名为NetraLink的系统，使用头戴式GoPro捕获真实世界的自我中心数据，并构建了涵盖辅助场景的基准测试，评估了多个state-of-the-art模型在识别日常物体(如货币)、基于场景文本回答问题以及多语言视觉内容阅读等任务上的表现。
AI.result: 提供了对当前MLLMs的全面诊断，揭示了其在支持基于视觉感知和语言交互的辅助技术方面的优势和局限性。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为理解MLLMs在辅助AI领域的实际应用潜力提供了重要参考，并指出了未来改进方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Assistive AI applications (helping visually impaired users with daily tasks like object recognition, reading currency, multilingual text) using multimodal large language models (MLLMs). This is completely different from the research profile's domain of Text-to-Motion Generation in Computer Graphics/Computer Vision. While the paper does use Vision-Language Models (VLMs), this is for assistive technology (accessibility for blind users), NOT for quality control of video-to-3D motion conversion, text-to-motion consistency, or video generation stability. The application domain is entirely different - assistive/rehabilitation AI vs. generative motion/video synthesis.

title: Elo-Disentangled Player-Style Embeddings for Human Chess via Rating-Conditioned Residual Move Model
summary: We study representation learning for individual human chess style: a per-player embedding learned from a player's move history such that inner products measure stylistic similarity, while being approximately disentangled from playing strength (Elo). Our key design is a residual formulation: a rating-conditioned base move model (Maia-3 policy logits plus Stockfish-derived features, scored over Maia-2-proposed candidates) captures what a typical player of a given strength would play, and a frozen copy of it anchors a learned move encoder and a per-player vector z, so that z explains only deviations from rating-typical play. The base model improves move prediction over the strong Maia-3 policy by 27-37% relative NLL across the rating spectrum, with the largest gains at the top (2800+); Stockfish's marginal value grows monotonically with Elo (negligible at 900-1200, +0.085 nats at 2800+). On a shared Elo-stratified benchmark of 22,620 held-out decisions, top-1 move-matching rises monotonically from Maia-2 to Maia-3 to the Stockfish-augmented base (0.51 -> 0.57 -> 0.68): the base is +33% relative top-1 over Maia-2 and +19% over Maia-3 (30% lower NLL), with the engine-feature lift largest at high Elo. The player embedding adds little to raw move-matching on top of this base -- its marginal top-1 gain falls within the 95% confidence interval -- and its value is instead representational: z generalizes to held-out decisions without overfitting, re-identifies players from disjoint games above chance, and a linear probe recovers rating from z with only R^2 = 0.06 (no better nonlinearly), evidence it captures style on an Elo-orthogonal axis. We argue that a strong rating-conditioned base plus a compact, Elo-disentangled embedding -- separating typical play from individual deviation -- is an economical, interpretable model of individual style, an alternative to per-player preference fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种从棋手走棋历史中学习个体风格表示的方法，通过残差 formulation 将风格与棋力（Elo）解耦。
AI.motivation: 现有棋类AI模型（如Maia、Stockfish）主要关注预测"最佳走法"，而非捕捉个体棋手的独特风格。研究者希望学习一种能够衡量棋手风格相似性，同时与棋力（Elo）解耦的表示方法。
AI.method: 核心设计是残差 formulation：基于评分的基准走法模型（Maia-3策略logits加上Stockfish衍生特征，在Maia-2候选中评分）预测给定棋力的典型走法，然后冻结该模型作为锚点，学习一个走法编码器和每个玩家的向量z，使得z只解释与评分典型走法的偏差。
AI.result: 基准模型相比强Maia-3策略在评分谱上相对NLL提升27-37%，最高分（2800+）增益最大。Stockfish的边际价值随Elo单调增长（900-1200可忽略，2800+达+0.085 nats）。在22620个保留决策的共享Elo分层基准上，top-1走法匹配从Maia-2的0.51升至Maia-3的0.57再到Stockfish增强基准的0.68。玩家嵌入在原始走法匹配上增益很小，但其价值在于表示能力：z能泛化到保留决策且不过拟合，能从非交叉游戏重新识别玩家，线性探测从z恢复评分仅R²=0.06（非线性也无法提升），证明它捕捉了与Elo正交的风格轴。
AI.conclusion: 强评分条件基准加上紧凑的Elo解耦嵌入——分离典型走法与个体偏差——是一种经济、可解释的个体风格模型，是每玩家偏好微调的经济替代方案。

title: Neural Network Quantization by Learning Low-Loss Subspaces
summary: Neural network quantization aims to find a discrete representation of parameters that preserves the performance of a full-precision (FP) model as faithfully as possible. Enforcing discrete constraints perturbs parameters away from a well-optimized minimum, generally resulting in performance degradation. Recent studies indicate that low-loss FP solutions are not isolated, but instead belong to connected low-loss subspaces of the loss landscape, where the loss maintains nearly the same minimum value. Models sampled from these subspaces are diverse and retain high accuracy. This raises the question: can a quantized model be constructed to lie within a low-loss subspace of the FP model, thereby automatically preserving performance? We address this question by learning quantization-aware linear paths in weight space optimized to minimize loss. We demonstrate that the midpoint of the resulting subspace is, by design, quantization-friendly and that its direct quantization yields performance comparable to that of quantization-aware training. The proposed procedure offers a novel perspective on weight quantization and, in contrast to conventional methods, neither relies on the straight-through estimator nor involves explicit discretization during training.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于量化感知线性路径的神经网络量化方法，通过在权重空间中学习低损失子空间，使量化模型自动位于该子空间内，从而在无需传统直通估计器和显式离散化训练的情况下，实现与量化感知训练相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 神经网络量化中，强制离散约束会导致参数偏离优化后的最小值，造成性能下降。如何利用低损失子空间的特性，使量化模型自动保留全精度模型的性能，是一个关键问题。
AI.method: 学习量化感知的线性路径（在权重空间中连接不同初始化或解的路径），通过优化使路径的中点位于低损失子空间中。该中点本质上对量化友好，直接量化即可获得良好性能，无需显式离散化训练或直通估计器。
AI.result: 所得到子空间的中点设计为量化友好的，直接量化后性能与量化感知训练相当，提供了不同于传统方法的新视角。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为权重量化提供了新颖视角，证明了通过构建量化友好的低损失子空间，可以绕过传统量化方法的局限性，在训练过程中无需显式离散化即可获得高性能的量化模型。

relevance_reason: This paper is about neural network quantization (a model compression/optimization technique), which is completely unrelated to the research profile's domain of Text-to-Motion Generation in Computer Graphics/Computer Vision. The application domain is entirely different - even though both papers involve neural networks, this paper addresses model quantization for efficiency, not motion generation, video synthesis, or VLM-based quality control. The methods and goals are fundamentally mismatched.

title: Transferability for General Reasoning: An Automated Curriculum for Multi-Domain RLVR
comment: 32 pages, including supplementary material; code available at https://github.com/YangYongJin/transfer-aware-curriculum
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has been extended from single-domain training to multi-domain reasoning suites spanning mathematics, programming, and science. However, the training curriculum (how often each domain is sampled) is typically fixed or hand-tuned, even though reasoning skills transfer unevenly across domains. Existing learnability-based curricula adapt to where the policy is currently improving, but are blind to whether a gradient step on the selected domain benefits the remaining domains. In this paper, we propose Transfer-Aware Curriculum (TAC), a bandit-style online curriculum that prioritizes domains whose updates broadly benefit the rest of the training suite. TAC repurposes signals already produced by RL training: per-domain advantages capture local learnability, and projected gradients, taken from the GRPO step being computed, estimate cross-domain transferability via gradient-geometry alignment, at negligible cost (<1% wall-clock overhead). Across a six-domain reasoning suite, TAC achieves the best macro-averaged accuracy on both Qwen3-1.7B and Llama3.2-3B, outperforming proportional random sampling, a hand-designed schedule, and a learnability-only bandit, and improving over the last of these by up to 2.8 points (10% relative). Ablations show performance degrades sharply when the transferability term is removed, and TAC remains robust on imbalanced training mixtures where learnability-only curricula over-commit to dominant domains. Our findings establish cross-domain transferability as a key signal for curriculum design in multi-domain RLVR.

AI.tldr: 提出了Transfer-Aware Curriculum (TAC)，一种基于 bandit 的在线课程调度方法，用于多域强化学习推理训练。TAC 利用域间优势捕捉局部可学习性，利用 GRPO 的投影梯度通过梯度几何对齐估计跨域迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有课程调度方法要么固定/手动调整，要么仅考虑局部可学习性（策略当前改进的域），但忽视了对其他域更新的益处。跨域推理技能迁移不均匀，需要一种能识别哪些域更新能广泛惠及训练套件的方法。
AI.method: TAC 采用 bandit 风格的在线课程调度，重塑 RL 训练中已有的信号：每域优势捕捉局部可学习性，从正在计算的 GRPO 步骤中获取投影梯度，通过梯度几何对齐估计跨域迁移性，开销极低（<1% wall-clock 开销）。
AI.result: 在六域推理套件上，TAC 在 Qwen3-1.7B 和 Llama3.2-3B 上均取得最佳宏平均准确率，优于比例随机采样、手工设计调度和仅可学习性 bandit，最多提升 2.8 点（10% 相对）。消融实验表明移除迁移性项后性能急剧下降，TAC 在不平衡训练混合中保持稳健。
AI.conclusion: 跨域迁移性是多域强化学习课程设计的关键信号。TAC 通过利用梯度几何对齐估计迁移性，为课程调度提供了有效指导。

title: Reflective VLA: In-Context Action Consequences Make VLAs Generalize
summary: Most vision-language-action (VLA) models are reactive: they predict the next action from the current instruction and observation, implicitly assuming that the current observation fully specifies the action-relevant state. In embodied control, however, embodiment-specific factors such as camera-to-robot geometry, robot calibration, or systematic actuation bias are often hard to identify from a single observation. As a result, reactive policies cannot reliably disambiguate these factors in general, overfitting to training environments and generalizing poorly at deployment. We propose Reflective VLA, which conditions each decision on a context of observation-action-consequence triplets. Each triplet records not only what the robot observed and executed, but also how the scene changed afterward, exposing the deployment-specific mapping from actions to observed effects. Architecturally, Reflective VLA routes all observation modalities through the VLM under shared attention, so the action expert reasons directly over past triplets and the current observation. A block-causal mask enables parallel multi-frame training without leakage and supports KV-cached real-time inference. On standard LIBERO and SimplerEnv-Bridge, Reflective VLA preserves strong in-distribution performance. Under distribution shift on LIBERO-Plus and the harder LIBERO-Plus-Hard, it improves average success rate by 5.4 and 4.2 percentage points over a matched reactive baseline. Ablations with a matched history-only baseline further show that action consequences -- rather than additional context length alone -- are the key to cross-environment generalization. Project page: https://lianqing11.github.io/reflective-vla-page/

AI.tldr: 本文提出Reflective VLA框架，通过引入观察-动作-结果三元组作为上下文信息，解决现有反应性VLA模型无法处理具体实施因素导致的泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型是反应性的，假设当前观察完全指定了动作相关状态。但在具身控制中，相机-机器人几何结构、机器人校准或系统执行偏差等因素难以从单一观察中识别，导致反应性策略过拟合训练环境，在部署时泛化能力差。
AI.method: Reflective VLA将每个决策基于观察-动作-结果三元组的上下文。每个三元组记录机器人观察了什么、执行了什么、以及场景如何变化，暴露了部署特定的动作到观察效果的映射。架构上，Reflective VLA将所有观察模态通过共享注意力路由到VLM，使动作专家直接对过去三元组和当前观察进行推理。块因果掩码实现并行多帧训练无泄漏，并支持KV缓存的实时推理。
AI.result: 在标准LIBERO和SimplerEnv-Bridge上，Reflective VLA保持了强大的分布内性能。在分布偏移的LIBERO-Plus和更难的LIBERO-Plus-Hard上，平均成功率比匹配的基线分别提高5.4和4.2个百分点。消融实验表明，行动后果而非额外的上下文长度是跨环境泛化的关键。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入观察-动作-结果三元组作为上下文，Reflective VLA能够有效捕获部署特定的动作到观察效果映射，从而在保持分布内性能的同时，显著提升跨环境泛化能力。行动后果信息是泛化的关键因素。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation for Computer Graphics (video-to-3D motion conversion, human motion generation), while this paper is about Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for ROBOTIC CONTROL in embodied AI. Although both involve VLMs, the application domains are fundamentally different: human motion generation vs robot manipulation control. The paper addresses generalization in robot deployment, not quality control of motion generation or consistency between 3D motion and text descriptions.

title: To Isolate or to Score? Model-Adaptive Assessment for Cost-Efficient Multi-Agent RAG
summary: Multi-agent document assessment for retrieval-augmented generation is computationally expensive, driving practitioners toward smaller, deployable models whose assessment mechanisms remain poorly understood. We conduct a controlled study of training-free interventions on 7B-9B instruction-tuned models across diverse QA benchmarks, revealing a sharp dichotomy in how models benefit from assessment. For weaker baselines, the dominant mechanism is per-document isolation. Astoundingly, assessment-free isolation matches full multi-agent assessment, demonstrating that resolving multi-document context confusion, rather than scoring quality, drives outsized gains of up to 50 percentage points. Conversely, for strong baselines where scoring quality matters, we introduce Reasoning-Score Coupling, a label-free perturbation probe that classifies scoring behavior. Integrating these findings, we propose MADARA, a model-adaptive routing architecture. Crucially, MADARA's diagnostic thresholds derived from a single pilot model generalize zero-shot to four unseen model families, providing a robust, lightweight pipeline to eliminate computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 针对检索增强生成中多智能体文档评估的计算成本问题，研究了7B-9B指令调整模型在训练无关干预下的表现，发现模型从评估中获益存在明显二分法。
AI.motivation: 解决RAG中多智能体文档评估的高计算成本问题 practitioners趋向使用更小部署模型但对其评估机制理解不足
AI.method: 对7B-9B指令调整模型进行受控训练无关干预研究，跨多样QA基准测试；引入Reasoning-Score Coupling标签无关扰动探针
AI.result: 弱基线模型获益主要来自文档隔离机制；无评估的隔离即可匹配完整多智能体评估，提升高达50个百分点；强基线模型需要质量评分；诊断阈值可零样本泛化到四个未见模型家族
AI.conclusion: 提出MADARA模型自适应路由架构，基于单个引导模型的诊断阈值可零样本泛化到多个未见模型家族，提供轻量级管道消除计算开销

The application domain is completely different - this is about LLM-based systems for question answering, not video generation, motion generation, or any computer graphics/vision tasks. The methods (7B-9B instruction-tuned models for RAG) are entirely unrelated to the required methods (Video Generation Models like Wanxiang/Seedance, VLM for quality filtering, 3D Motion Generation, Feature Extraction pipelines).

title: Cage-based Texture Transfer with Geometric Filtering
summary: Real-time texture transfer expands the creative horizon for interactive applications, enabling seamless detail projection in scenarios that range from digital character cosmetics to procedural automotive texturing. Yet, its practical application is governed by inherent trade-offs between processing speed and suppression of artifacts. Low-latency transfer methods frequently fail to suppress artifacts, and robust alternatives rely on large-scale models that are costly in training and memory. Our proposed method bridges the gap between efficiency and robustness by using a cage-based geometric filtering method to identify Non-Cosmetic Zones (NCZs) for artifact suppression. While other models are resource-intensive and require multiple days of training on manually annotated datasets, we are able to successfully suppress artifacts and achieve immediate deployment on consumer-grade hardware. Our framework achieved highly efficient runtimes of ~70ms on mobile devices for a ~4.8k triangle mesh.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于 cage 的几何滤波方法，用于实时纹理传输中的伪影抑制，能够在移动设备上实现约70ms的高效运行。
AI.motivation: 实时纹理传输在数字角色化妆和程序化汽车纹理等应用中有广阔前景，但现有方法在处理速度和伪影抑制之间存在权衡：低延迟方法无法有效抑制伪影，而鲁棒的方法需要大规模模型，训练和内存成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出一种基于 cage 的几何滤波方法来识别非美容区域（Non-Cosmetic Zones, NCZs），从而实现伪影抑制。该方法无需大规模训练模型，可直接在消费级硬件上部署。
AI.result: 在移动设备上针对约4.8k三角形网格实现了约70ms的高效运行时，成功抑制了伪影。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效填补了效率与鲁棒性之间的空白，能够在消费级硬件上实现即时部署，为交互应用中的实时纹理传输提供了实用的解决方案。

relevance_reason: The paper is about cage-based texture transfer for 3D models (digital character makeup, car textures), which is completely different from the research profile's Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain (texture transfer vs motion generation) and methods (cage-based geometric filtering vs video generation/VLM/motion models) have no overlap. This paper addresses artifact suppression in texture rendering, which is unrelated to quality control of video-to-3D motion conversion or VLM-based filtering mentioned in the pain points.

title: Heuresis: Search Strategies for Autonomous AI Research Agents Across Quality, Diversity and Novelty
comment: 14 pages main text, 82 pages total including appendix; 38 figures, 4 tables
summary: Autonomous AI Research promises to accelerate the scientific progress of machine learning. To realise this goal, current Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents need to go beyond just writing code, to mastering the exploration of simultaneously performant, diverse and novel ideas. To this end, we introduce Heuresis, a framework that abstracts the research pipeline into a set of general and composable primitives, enabling open-ended scientific exploration in machine learning research. We implement six search strategies: a greedy baseline, two archive-based (MAP-Elites, Go-Explore), one evolutionary (Islands), and two divergent (Curiosity, Omni), and evaluate them across three axes (Quality, Diversity, and Novelty) on three domains (LLM Pretraining, On-Policy RL, and Model Unlearning), totalling 3,222 scored runs. We find that completely novel ideas are rare. No idea across our scored runs is rated as "Original", and only a few achieve only "Minor Similarity" to prior work. Moreover, novel ideas never approach the highest-performing known-recipe scores. Across all six strategies and three domains, only one such idea lands in the top-10 by quality. We also observed agents resorting to a variety of reward-hacking techniques during execution (40 confirmed fabrications across 1,628 scored runs), and detecting them was necessary to keep the search faithful to the task. Our results show that while current search and Quality-Diversity strategies enable us to steer where the generated ideas land on the quality, diversity, and novelty axes, they do not expand the quality-novelty frontier. Bridging this gap is the open challenge towards the ultimate goal of perpetual, autonomous scientific progress. Code is available at github.com/a-antoniades/Heuresis.

AI.tldr: Heuresis是一个自主AI研究框架，通过6种搜索策略在机器学习研究中进行开放性科学探索
AI.motivation: 当前LLM代理需要超越代码编写，实现高性能、多样且新颖想法的探索，以加速机器学习科学进展
AI.method: 实现6种搜索策略(贪心、MAP-Elites、Go-Explore、Islands、Curiosity、Omni)，在3个领域(LLM预训练、On-Policy RL、模型遗忘)进行3222次评分运行，从质量、多样性、新颖性三维度评估
AI.result: 完全新颖想法罕见，无"原创"想法；新颖想法无法达到最高性能；6种策略3领域仅1个想法进入质量前10；检测到40例奖励作弊
AI.conclusion: 当前搜索策略无法扩展质量-新颖性边界，这是实现持续自主科学进展的核心挑战
