The application domain is entirely unrelated (LLM research vs. video-to-3D motion conversion). No shared methods or pain points.

title: MJEPA: A Simple and Scalable Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture for Audio-Visual Learning
summary: Self-supervised learning from large-scale video data has emerged as a dominant paradigm for visual representation learning. Since audio and visual streams naturally co-occur in video data, extending this success to jointly learn from both modalities is a natural next step, yet it remains challenging. Existing audio-visual self-supervised methods rely on modality-specific encoders and complex combinations of contrastive or reconstruction objectives, limiting cross-modal synergy and scalability. Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) offer a simple, modality-agnostic alternative, but have to date been applied primarily to individual modalities. We introduce MJEPA, a joint-embedding predictive architecture for audio-visual learning that uses a single, unified encoder for both modalities. Our approach uses only a single predictive objective, applied both within and across modalities. We show that cross-modal prediction is critical: without it, a shared encoder degrades below unimodal baselines; with it, each modality's representation benefits from the other. Our frozen ViT-g model outperforms the best prior frozen baseline by over 6.8 mAP on AudioSet-20K, surpasses fully finetuned models on ESC-50 and FSD50K, and is competitive on video benchmarks despite using 10x less video data.

AI.tldr: MJEPA是一种用于视听学习的联合嵌入预测架构，使用单一的统一编码器处理音频和视觉模态，仅使用单个预测目标实现模态内和跨模态预测。
AI.motivation: 自监督学习在视频数据上取得成功，但将其扩展到音频和视觉模态的联合学习仍具挑战。现有方法依赖模态特定编码器和复杂的对比或重建目标，限制了跨模态协同和可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出MJEPA方法，使用单一统一编码器处理音频和视觉模态，仅采用单个预测目标，同时应用于模态内和跨模态预测。
AI.result: 跨模态预测至关重要：无它时共享编码器性能下降至低于单模态基线；有它时各模态表示相互受益。冻结的ViT-g模型在AudioSet-20K上比最佳冻结基线高6.8 mAP，在ESC-50和FSD50K上超越完全微调模型，在视频基准上具有竞争力，尽管使用少10倍视频数据。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态预测对于使用统一编码器的联合视听学习至关重要，表明简单统一架构配合跨模态预测可有效实现多模态表示学习。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about Audio-Visual Learning using joint-embedding predictive architecture for self-supervised learning on audio-visual data. This is entirely different from the research profile's Text-to-Motion Generation domain. The application domain mismatch is fundamental: the paper focuses on learning joint audio-visual representations, not generating 3D human motion from text or video. The methods are also completely different - there's no motion generation model, no video generation pipeline, and no quality control mechanisms for motion synthesis. This paper would only be tangentially relevant if the research profile were about general video understanding, but it has zero direct relevance to text-to-motion generation.

title: Omni-Perception Policy Optimization for Multimodal Emotion Reasoning
summary: We find that current emotion-oriented Omni-MLLMs still lack reliable omni-modal perception: they (i) underutilize multimodal cues in their reasoning trajectories and (ii) exhibit unfaithful behavior, often hallucinating modality-specific statements from other modalities. Building on these insights, we propose OPPO (Omni-Perception Policy Optimization), a reinforcement learning framework that explicitly optimizes multimodal perception. First, an Omni-Perception Reward decomposes ground-truth reasoning into fine-grained visual, acoustic, and emotion cues and rewards trajectories that semantically recover these cues. Second, an Omni-Perception Loss compares the policy under full and unimodally masked inputs, applying a KL penalty only to modality-specific evidence tokens to suppress cross-modal hallucination. We further introduce MEP-Bench, a diagnostic benchmark that quantifies utilization and faithfulness. Experiments show that OPPO achieves state-of-the-art performance on MER-UniBench and MME-Emotion, while substantially improving utilization and faithfulness scores on MEP-Bench, highlighting the importance of sufficient and faithful omni perception for multimodal emotion reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OPPO框架，通过强化学习优化多模态感知，解决情感导向的Omni-MLLMs中多模态线索利用不足和跨模态幻觉问题。
AI.motivation: 当前情感导向的Omni-MLLMs缺乏可靠的全模态感知能力：(1)推理轨迹中未充分利用多模态线索；(2)表现出不忠实行为，经常产生跨模态幻觉。
AI.method: 提出OPPO框架，包含：(1)Omni-Perception Reward将真实推理分解为细粒度视觉、听觉和情感线索，奖励能语义恢复这些线索的轨迹；(2)Omni-Perception Loss比较完整输入和单模态掩码输入下的策略，仅对模态特定证据令牌应用KL惩罚以抑制跨模态幻觉。同时引入MEP-Bench诊断基准。
AI.result: 在MER-UniBench和MPE-Bench上达到最优性能，显著提升MME-Emotion表现，大幅改善利用性和忠实性评分。
AI.conclusion: 充分且忠实的多模态感知对多模态情感推理至关重要。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multimodal emotion reasoning in Large Language Models (Omni-MLLMs), which is completely different from the research field of Text-to-Motion Generation. While both involve multimodal inputs, the application domain is entirely different: this paper addresses emotion understanding and cross-modal hallucination in emotional content, whereas the research profile focuses on 3D human motion generation from text/video inputs using video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance. There is no overlap in application domain or research goals.

title: Structuring Sparsity: Block-Sparse Featurizers Capture Visual Concept Manifolds
summary: What is the geometry of a visual percept? The most widely used protocols for decomposing neural network representations into interpretable parts treat concepts as isolated directions, yet recent work shows that concepts are often realized as geometric structures in low dimensional regions of activation space. We turn to the literature of Structured sparsity to close this gap, and show that block sparsity, which groups directions into blocks, is the prior matched to a generative model in which a representation is a sparse sum of low-dimensional manifolds: the modern, learned form of a classical idea in visual neuroscience, where a visual feature is carried by a coordinated group of neurons rather than a single tuned one. We implement three variants of block-sparse featurizers (BSFs) and, through a minimum-description-length analysis, show that all three describe activations more compactly than direction-based featurizers, with the recovered concepts typically two- to four-dimensional. We then use BSFs to (i) recontextualize prior work, showing that curve detectors in InceptionV1 actually read from a single continuous curve manifold, (ii) discover novel manifolds including shadows and lighting in DINOv3, and (iii) support interpretable control of image generation in diffusion models (SDXL) via manifold steering.

AI.tldr: 论文研究视觉感知的几何结构，提出块稀疏性(BSF)作为揭示低维流形的先验，比传统方向方法更紧凑地描述激活，可应用于曲线检测器重解释、发现新流形和图像生成控制。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将概念视为孤立方向，但视觉概念实际是激活空间中的低维流形结构，需要更匹配的稀疏性先验来捕获这种几何特性。
AI.method: 实现三种块稀疏特征化器(BSF)变体，通过最小描述长度分析比较压缩性，并应用于InceptionV1、DINOv3和SDXL模型。
AI.result: BSF比方向方法描述激活更紧凑，概念通常为2-4维；发现曲线检测器读自连续曲线流形、DINOv3中的阴影和光照流形，并实现SDXL中的流形控制。
AI.conclusion: 块稀疏是与稀疏低维流形生成模型匹配的先验，为视觉神经科学的经典思想(特征由协调神经元群而非单个调谐神经元携带)提供了现代学习形式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about visual concept manifolds and block-sparse feature extraction for IMAGE generation (SDXL), completely unrelated to Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - image generation vs 3D human motion generation. It doesn't address any of the specified pain points (video-to-3D motion conversion, text-to-motion consistency, VLM quality filtering). While it discusses feature extraction, this is for visual concepts in image models, not motion features. The methods (DINOv3, SDXL) are image-based, not motion generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance.

title: OrthoTrack: Continuous 6-DoF UAV Trajectory Estimation Anchored in Public Orthophotos
summary: Continuous 6-DoF pose estimation is essential for autonomous UAV operations. Yet, existing visual odometry and SLAM methods accumulate drift and yield only relative, up-to-scale trajectories. Single-frame geo-localization, in turn, discards temporal continuity and remains too slow for real-time use. We present OrthoTrack, a training-free system that estimates continuous 6-DoF UAV trajectories using only publicly available orthophotos and surface models as a map prior. OrthoTrack matches keyframes against the orthophoto and lifts correspondences to metric 3D via the surface model. It then propagates these map-anchored correspondences to intermediate frames with optical flow, producing absolute, metrically scaled poses at every frame without GPS or post-hoc alignment. We also introduce the MovingDrone Dataset, a large-scale benchmark pairing photorealistic UAV sequences with dense 6-DoF ground truth and co-registered multi-modal geodata including multi-temporal orthophotos. On MovingDrone and real-world benchmarks, OrthoTrack runs in real time on a single GPU. It outperforms all baselines by a large margin, even those receiving oracle scale and alignment. By relying on publicly available geodata, OrthoTrack enables deployment to new regions without site-specific adaptation.

AI.tldr: OrthoTrack是一个无需训练的6-DoF无人机轨迹估计系统，利用公开的正射影像和地表模型作为地图先验，通过关键帧匹配、光流传播等技术，实现实时、绝对度量的轨迹估计。同时提出了MovingDrone数据集用于基准测试。
AI.motivation: 解决现有视觉里程计和SLAM方法的漂移问题，以及单帧地理定位速度慢且无法保持时间连续性的问题，实现实时、绝对度量的无人机6-DoF姿态估计。
AI.method: 1)关键帧与正射影像匹配；2)通过地表模型将对应关系提升到度量3D；3)利用光流将地图锚定的对应关系传播到中间帧；4)在每帧产生绝对度量尺度的姿态，无需GPS或后处理对齐。
AI.result: 在MovingDrone和真实世界基准测试上，OrthoTrack在单GPU上实时运行，性能大幅优于所有基线方法，即使与接收神谕尺度和对齐的基线相比也如此。
AI.conclusion: 通过依赖公开可用的地理数据，OrthoTrack实现了无需场地特定适应即可部署到新区域的能力，是6-DoF无人机轨迹估计的重要突破。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation (generating 3D human motion from text descriptions using diffusion models, VLMs for quality control). The paper OrthoTrack is about UAV trajectory estimation using orthophotos and optical flow - this is SLAM/Visual Odometry for drones, NOT human motion generation. Different application domain entirely.

title: What Actually Works for Spacecraft Fault-Tolerant Control: An Honest Settled-Gate Benchmark of Learned and Classical Methods
summary: Recent learned fault-tolerant-control (FTC) work reports high success on spacecraft actuator faults, but often in simulation, on narrow fault sets, and with transient metrics that a trajectory need only touch once. We ask what recovers spacecraft pointing when success means holding it on faults never seen in training. We answer with a benchmark built around a settled gate, pointing held within 0.2 deg over a dwell window and scored on the true state, train/test splits disjoint in inertia, gain, sign pattern, and bias, Wilson intervals over n=500 episodes per cell, and one-command reproduction on a 6-DOF Basilisk testbed. Across classical, adaptive, learned end-to-end, and structured controllers, three findings stand out. Fault-unaware PD/PID and from-scratch end-to-end RL score 0%, so learning capacity alone is not the lever. Classical adaptive laws resolve sign faults but handle gain poorly at 55.2%, and a literature-faithful Nussbaum-gain law reaches 45.2% and 3.2%. A structured estimate-then-control design, with a learned recurrent module that infers actuator gain online and feeds an analytic law, wins on sign and gain faults at 97.8% and 94.4%, approaching the privileged oracle while unstructured methods remain at zero. The hard wall is constant additive bias, which is 0% for every controller including the privileged gain oracle, because an integral-free law cannot null a constant disturbance. We close it with a disturbance observer that recovers bias from the dynamics and is self-correcting for gain-estimate error. Composed with the gain estimate, it recovers 59.4% of held-out bias faults with no sign/gain regression, moving that class off zero. We classify sensor-fault regimes similarly, show that sensor bias is unobservable from the corrupted measurement alone and therefore requires fusion rather than an observer, and release the benchmark so the gate is shared.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个 spacecraft pointing 控制的基准测试,评估了经典、自适应、端到端学习和结构化估计-控制等多种 FTC 控制器在 actuator fault 下的性能。结构化估计-控制设计(利用学习递归模块在线推断 actuator gain 并馈送给解析律)在 sign 和 gain fault 上分别达到 97.8% 和 94.4%,优于其他方法。但 constant additive bias 对所有控制器(包括 oracle)都是 0%,因为无积分律无法消除恒定扰动。最后提出 disturbance observer 可恢复 59.4% 的 held-out bias faults。
AI.motivation: 现有 FTC 研究多在模拟环境、窄 fault 集合上测试,需要评估在从未见过的 fault 类型下能否保持 spacecraft pointing。现有方法在 constant additive bias 上面临 hard wall。
AI.method: 构建基准测试:settled gate, pointing 在 0.2 deg 内保持超过 dwell window,基于真实状态评分, train/test 在 inertia、gain、sign pattern、bias 上 disjoint,Wilson intervals over n=500 episodes,在 6-DOF Basilisk testbed 上测试。评估了 classical PD/PID、adaptive laws、Nussbaum-gain law、端到端 RL、结构化 estimate-then-control、disturbance observer 等多种控制器。
AI.result: 1)Fault-unaware PD/PID 和 from-scratch 端到端 RL 均 0%;2)经典自适应律能解决 sign fault 但 gain 处理差(55.2%),Nussbaum-gain law 45.2%/3.2%;3)结构化 estimate-then-control 在 sign/gain fault 上 97.8%/94.4%,接近 privileged oracle;4)constant additive bias 对所有控制器包括 privileged gain oracle 为 0%,因为无积分律无法消除恒定扰动;5)disturbance observer 恢复 59.4% held-out bias faults,且无 sign/gain 回归。
AI.conclusion: 学习 capacity 本身不是关键,结构化设计(learned recurrent module + analytic law)优于非结构化方法。Constant additive bias 是 FTC 的 hard wall,需要 disturbance observer 才能恢复。基准测试和代码已发布以推动研究。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about spacecraft fault-tolerant control in aerospace engineering, focusing on control systems for spacecraft pointing and actuator fault handling. The application domain is completely different from the research profile which is about Computer Graphics/Computer Vision - Text-to-Motion Generation (generating 3D human motion from text descriptions). There is no overlap in application domain, methods (no diffusion models, VLMs, video generation, or motion generation), or research area. The paper addresses spacecraft control problems, not any text-to-motion or video generation quality control issues.

title: Multilingual Hematology Visual Question Answering Dataset
summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) have shown promising capabilities in medical image analysis by jointly understanding visual and textual information for tasks such as Visual Question Answering. However, existing hematology vision-language resources remain predominantly English centric, limiting their applicability in multilingual healthcare environments. This challenge is releveant generally to South Asia and specifically to Pakistan, where Urdu is widely used despite healthcare information and digital medical systems being largely dependent on English. To investigate this gap, we conducted a survey among healthcare professionals, which revealed substantial language mismatches between clinical documentation and patient communication, emphasizing the need for multilingual healthcare technologies. To address this limitation, we introduce WBCMor VQA, a clinically validated bilingual English, Urdu morphology aware VQA benchmark for leukemia and normal white blood cell analysis. The benchmark is constructed using morphology-aware annotations from LeukemiaAttri and WBCAtt datasets and supported by a domain specific Urdu hematology dictionary to ensure linguistic consistency and clinical correctness. The final benchmark contains 110K bilingual question answer pairs serving as VQA annotations for 20K leukemic and normal single-cell images. Furthermore, we establish baseline performance by evaluating multiple open-source VLMs on the proposed benchmark. The proposed resource aims to facilitate the development of accessible and clinically relevant AI systems for multilingual healthcare environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了WBCMor VQA，一个针对白血病和正常白细胞分析的双语（英语-乌尔都语）视觉问答基准数据集，旨在解决现有血液学视觉语言资源以英语为中心的问题，服务于巴基斯坦等多语言医疗环境。
AI.motivation: 现有血液学视觉语言资源以英语为中心，限制了其在多语言医疗环境中的应用。巴基斯坦以乌尔都语为通用语言，但医疗信息和数字医疗系统主要依赖英语，导致临床文档与患者沟通之间存在显著的语言不匹配问题。
AI.method: 通过对医疗专业人员进行调查确认语言不匹配问题；利用LeukemiaAttri和WBCAtt数据集的形态学注释构建基准数据集；创建领域特定的乌尔都语血液学词典以确保语言一致性和临床正确性；最终包含11万个双语问答对，对应2万个白血病和正常单细胞图像；评估多个开源VLM作为基线。
AI.result: 构建了首个临床验证的双语英语-乌尔都语形态学感知VQA基准数据集，包含11万个问答对和2万个单细胞图像，并建立了多个开源VLMs的基线性能。
AI.conclusion: 该资源旨在促进多语言医疗环境中可访问且临床相关的AI系统开发，推动白血病筛查和诊断技术在非英语地区的应用。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical Visual Question Answering (VQA) for leukemia and white blood cell analysis - a completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion Generation in Computer Graphics. Although both use Vision-Language Models, the purpose is entirely different: medical image QA vs. human motion generation. The pain points (medical language barriers in multilingual healthcare) and methods (medical VQA dataset creation) have no relevance to video-to-3D motion conversion, text-to-motion generation, or video generation model quality control.

title: Offline Multi-agent Continual Cooperation via Skill Partition and Reuse
summary: Extracting skills from multi-agent offline dataset improves learning efficiency via sharing task-invariant coordination skills among tasks. In settings where tasks occur sequentially and the space of skills grows exponentially, existing approaches that rely on heuristically designed and fixed-sized skill libraries struggle to resolve the problem of distributional shift and interference, facing catastrophic forgetting and plasticity loss. To address this problem and endow agents with the ability to continually discover and reuse coordination skills in open-environment, we propose COMAD, a principled framework for Continual Offline Multi-agent Skill Discovery via Skill Partition and Reuse. We first discover skills from mixed multi-agent behavior data with an auto-encoder to transform coordination knowledge into reusable coordination skills. Then we construct a skill-augmented policy learning objective with multi-head architectures, explicitly guiding the advantage function with reusable skills identified via a density-based reusability estimator. Theoretical analysis shows our method approximates the optimum of a continual skill discovery problem. Empirical results across diverse MARL benchmarks show that COMAD continually expands its skill library to mitigate interference, achieving superior forward and backward transfer for task streams compared to multiple baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出COMAD框架,解决多智能体离线数据集中持续发现和重用协调技能的问题。该方法通过自编码器从行为数据中提取技能,使用密度估计器识别可重用技能,并构建技能增强的策略学习目标。实验表明该方法能够持续扩展技能库,缓解任务间的干扰,实现优异的前向和后向迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖启发式设计的固定大小技能库,难以解决顺序任务场景中的分布漂移和干扰问题,面临灾难性遗忘和可塑性损失。当技能空间指数增长时,无法有效处理开放环境下的持续技能发现。
AI.method: 提出COMAD框架,包含三个核心组件:1)使用自编码器从混合多智能体行为数据中发现技能,将协调知识转化为可重用技能;2)构建技能增强的策略学习目标,采用多头架构;3)通过密度-based可重用性估计器显式引导advantage函数识别可重用技能。
AI.result: 在多个MARL基准测试上,COMAD能够持续扩展技能库以缓解干扰,与多个基线方法相比实现了更优的前向和后向迁移性能。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析表明该方法逼近持续技能发现问题的最优解。COMAD为开放环境下多智能体持续发现和重用协调技能提供了原则性框架。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) for skill discovery and cooperation, which is entirely different from the research field of Text-to-Motion Generation in Computer Graphics/Computer Vision. The paper deals with multi-agent systems and skill reuse in robotics coordination, while the research profile focuses on video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance), VLM-based quality filtering, and generating 3D motion from text/video descriptions. There is no application domain match - they are in completely different research areas.

title: Cross-Modality Structural Guidance in 3D Latent Diffusion for Robust FLAIR Super-Resolution
summary: High-resolution (HR) MRI acquisition is often hampered by scan time constraints, resulting in anisotropic or low-resolution scans (e.g., thick-slice FLAIR) that limit diagnostic accuracy. While deep learning-based super-resolution (SR) methods show promise, they often hallucinate anatomical details, which can compromise brain structural integrity. To mitigate this limitation, we introduce MR-DiffuSR, a Multi-Resolution Diffusion-based Super-Resolution framework that incorporates HR T1w structural image priors to guide the restoration of thick-slice FLAIR scans and operates in the 3D latent space. Our architecture introduces cross-modality structural swin-attention, which derives structural attention maps from the HR T1w and applies them to the low-resolution FLAIR latent features. This design disentangles anatomical structure from modality-specific contrast, effectively preventing hallucinations. Furthermore, we employ a mixed-scale degradation strategy, training the model on a continuum of downsampling factors to ensure robustness to varying slice thicknesses, while optimizing with a DINOv3-based perceptual loss to preserve high-frequency semantic details. Evaluated on the ADNI-4 dataset, MR-DiffuSR surpasses both CNN and 2D diffusion approaches, achieving an average PSNR of 32.46dB, SSIM of 0.97, and LPIPS of 0.07 across all downsampling factors. In downstream white matter hyperintensity segmentation, our model demonstrates exceptional robustness. While baseline performance collapses at 10x down-sampling (Dice: 0.51), MR-DiffuSR maintains a Dice score of 0.63, preserving utility even at 7mm equivalent slice thickness.

AI.tldr: MR-DiffuSR是一种基于多分辨率扩散模型的超分辨率框架,利用HR T1w结构像先验引导厚层FLAIR扫描的增强,在3D潜空间运行,通过跨模态结构swin注意力机制解耦解剖结构与模态对比度,防止幻觉伪影.
AI.motivation: 高分辨率MRI采集受扫描时间限制,常产生各向异性或低分辨率扫描（如厚层FLAIR），限制了诊断准确性。现有深度学习超分辨率方法常产生解剖细节幻觉，危及脑结构完整性。
AI.method: 提出跨模态结构swin-注意力机制,从HR T1w提取结构注意力图并应用于低分辨率FLAIR潜特征,解耦解剖结构与模态对比度;采用混合尺度退化策略,在连续降采样因子范围内训练确保对不同层厚的鲁棒性;使用DINOv2感知损失保留高频语义细节;在3D潜空间运行.
AI.result: 在ADNI-4数据集上,MR-DiffuSR超越CNN和2D扩散方法,达到平均PSNR 32.46dB、SSIM 0.97、LPIPS 0.07。在下游白质高信号分割中,10x降采样时基线性能崩溃（Dice: 0.51）,MR-DiffuSR保持Dice 0.63,在7mm等效层厚时仍保持可用性.
AI.conclusion: MR-DiffuSR通过结构先验引导和混合尺度训练策略,有效防止解剖结构幻觉,在极端降采样条件下仍保持诊断效用,为临床厚层MRI快速采集提供了有价值的解决方案.

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - this paper is about medical MRI super-resolution (computational radiology), not text-to-motion generation. While both use diffusion models, the application domain is entirely different: medical image enhancement vs human motion generation. The paper addresses MRI quality issues, not video-to-motion conversion or text-to-motion synthesis. This is a different field entirely.

title: Long-Term Simulation Exposes Cognitive-Developmental Risks in AI Companions
summary: AI companions powered by large language models increasingly interact with cognition-developing users, including children and adolescents, creating risks that may accumulate over time. Existing safety evaluations largely rely on single-turn or short-session tests, which cannot capture risks that emerge only through prolonged interaction. To address this gap, we propose TSJ (Theater-Stage-Judge), a longitudinal framework combining persona-driven user simulation, dynamic psychological-state updating and retrospective evaluation. We evaluate six mainstream models across four developmental stages, twenty-four risk dimensions and three psychological-vulnerability personas, covering 12,960 simulated person-day interactions. TSJ shows that short-horizon testing systematically underestimates developmental risks, for which TSJ yields a stable risk estimate only after 140 turns within prolonged simulated relationships. Applying TSJ further identifies early childhood and emerging adulthood as the most vulnerable stages, with cognitive trust and emotional dependency as the weakest domains. TSJ provides a scalable methodology for longitudinal cognitive developmental risk evaluation in AI companion systems.

AI.tldr: TSJ框架通过 persona驱动的用户模拟、动态心理状态更新和回顾性评估，对AI伴侣系统进行纵向认知发育风险评估，解决了现有短时测试无法捕捉长期交互风险的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型驱动的AI伴侣与发育中的用户（儿童和青少年）交互日益增多，存在累积性风险，但现有安全评估主要依赖单轮或短时测试，无法识别长期交互中出现的风险。
AI.method: TSJ框架结合 persona驱动用户模拟、动态心理状态更新和回顾性评估，在四个发育阶段、二十四个风险维度和三种心理脆弱性 persona 下评估了六个主流模型，共涵盖12,960个模拟人日交互。
AI.result: 短期测试系统性地低估发育风险；TSJ需在140轮对话后才能获得稳定风险估计；早期儿童和 emerging adulthood 是最脆弱阶段；认知信任和情感依赖是最弱领域。
AI.conclusion: TSJ为AI伴侣系统中的纵向认知发育风险评估提供了一种可扩展的方法论。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI companion safety evaluation and cognitive-developmental risk assessment - completely different field from Computer Graphics / Computer Vision - Text-to-Motion Generation. The paper addresses AI safety for LLM-based companions interacting with children, not motion generation, video generation, or any computer graphics/vision tasks. Zero application domain match.

title: Pre-Warm: Input-Conditioned Weight Initialization for Convolutional Neural Networks
summary:
We introduce Pre-Warm, a simple yet effective zero-training-cost method for data-conditioned initialization of the first convolutional layer. Before the first forward pass, Pre-Warm extracts mean-centered local patches from a single training batch, clusters them with MiniBatchKMeans, applies inverse Manhattan spatial weighting, and uses the resulting centroids to initialize half of the first-layer filters (the remainder retain Kaiming initialization).
  We derive closed-form rules for all hyperparameters except a single insensitive scale parameter, though we derive a Kaiming parity bound on scale from patch dimensionality. For grayscale datasets we use Otsu's foreground density; for natural color images we use the mean L2 norm of mean-centered patches. Both rules accurately predict the optimal patch count observed in grid search.
  Across five standard benchmarks -- MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, CIFAR-10, SVHN, and CIFAR-100 -- and 8-seed paired experiments, Pre-Warm yields statistically significant accuracy improvements over standard Kaiming initialization (p < 0.05 on all datasets, p = 0.0007 on SVHN with 8/8 wins, p = 0.0033 on CIFAR-100 with 7/8 wins). The method adds negligible overhead, requires no architectural changes, and integrates into existing training pipelines with only a few lines of code.
  Pre-Warm demonstrates that even a lightweight, input-dependent signal can meaningfully improve optimization trajectories in modern convolutional networks.

AI.tldr: Pre-Warm是一种零训练成本的数据条件化初始化方法，用于卷积网络第一层的权重初始化。该方法从单个训练批次中提取均值中心化局部 patches，通过MiniBatchKMeans聚类，逆曼哈顿空间加权，用所得质心初始化第一层一半滤波器。
AI.motivation: 现代卷积网络中，即使轻量级的输入依赖信号也能有效改善优化轨迹，提升模型性能。
AI.method: 1)从单个训练batch提取均值中心化局部 patches 2)使用MiniBatchKMeans聚类 3)应用逆曼哈顿空间加权 4)用质心初始化第一层一半滤波器(其余保持Kaiming初始化)。对灰度图使用Otsu前景密度规则，对自然彩色图像使用均值L2范数规则预测最优patch数。
AI.result: 在MNIST、Fashion-MNIST、CIFAR-10、SVHN、CIFAR-100五个基准数据集上，8种子配对实验中均取得统计学显著准确率提升(p<0.05)，SVHN数据集8/8胜(p=0.0007)，CIFAR-100数据集7/8胜(p=0.0033)。
AI.conclusion: Pre-Warm证明了轻量级输入依赖信号可有效改善现代卷积网络的优化轨迹，方法开销极小，无需架构修改，易于集成到现有训练流程。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation (generating 3D human motion from text/video) with methods including video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance), VLM-based quality filtering, and motion generation models. The paper is about weight initialization for CNNs for IMAGE CLASSIFICATION on standard benchmarks (MNIST, CIFAR-10, etc.). Even though both involve CNNs, the application domains are entirely different - image classification vs. text-to-motion generation. This is a fundamental mismatch in field and application.

title: BrainAgent: A Large Language Model-Driven Multi-Agent Framework for Autonomous Brain Signal Understanding
summary: Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs) and brain signal understanding are pivotal for clinical health and next-generation interactions. Despite this significance, its widespread adoption in real-world scenarios remains restricted, primarily because current analytical paradigms lack sufficient agentic intelligence. First, existing methodologies impose prohibitive technical barriers, requiring extensive specialized expertise. Second, they remain inherently static and task-specific, failing to execute the complex, long-horizon workflows essential for real-world deployment. To accelerate the democratization of brain signal understanding, we draw inspiration from Large Language Models (LLMs) to introduce BrainAgent, an LLM-driven multi-agent framework designed to ground abstract natural language intent into rigorous, executable, and end-to-end processing pipelines. BrainAgent employs a hierarchical architecture where a central supervisor orchestrates specialized sub-agents for adaptive task decomposition and execution. Furthermore, we establish a comprehensive, systematic benchmark for evaluating agentic systems in brain signal analysis. Empirical results demonstrate that BrainAgent effectively automates complex workflows with superior reliability, marking a paradigm shift toward democratized brain signal understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BrainAgent，一个基于大语言模型(LLM)的多智能体框架，旨在将抽象的自然语言意图转化为可执行的脑信号分析流水线，从而推动脑机接口技术的民主化。
AI.motivation: 当前脑信号分析技术面临两大核心障碍：1) 需 要广泛的专业技术知识，门槛过高；2) 方法静态且任务特定，无法处理现实世界中复杂的长期工作流程。这限制了脑机接口技术的广泛应用。
AI.method: BrainAgent采用层级架构，由中央协调器负责任务分解和执行，调度多个专业子智能体完成自适应的工作流程。通过借鉴大语言模型的能力，实现从自然语言到可执行分析管线的转化。
AI.result: 实验表明BrainAgent能够有效自动化复杂的工作流程，展现出卓越的可靠性，显著降低了脑信号分析的技术门槛。
AI.conclusion: BrainAgent代表了脑信号理解领域的范式转变，为 democratized brain signal understanding（民主化的脑信号理解）开辟了新路径，使非专业用户也能进行复杂的脑信号分析。

relevance_reason: 完全无关的领域。该研究档案是关于计算机图形学/计算机视觉中的文本到三维动作生成（Text-to-Motion Generation），而这篇论文是关于脑机接口（Brain-Computer Interface）中的脑信号分析。虽然都涉及LLM和多智能体框架，但应用领域完全不同：一个是生成人类动作用于图形/动画，另一个是分析脑信号用于神经科学。两者在核心应用场景、目标用户群体和技术落地上都没有任何交集。

title: CoGeoAD: Hierarchical Color-Geometric Fusion with Multi-View Attention for Zero-Shot 3D Anomaly Detection
summary: Zero-shot 3D anomaly detection is essential for industrial quality inspection, where labeled anomaly samples are scarce. Meanwhile, existing methods lack an effective mechanism to fuse complementary 2D color images with 3D geometric structures, limiting their ability to detect both surface and structural defects in a unified framework. To address these issues, we propose CoGeoAD, a unified CLIP-based framework that fuses color and geometric features by constructing pixel-aligned paired multi-view images. The framework introduces a Data-Driven Multi-View Attention (MVA) mechanism to adaptively aggregate 3D features and a Multi-Stage Color-Geometric Fusion (MS-CGF) module to hierarchically integrate multi-level features from both modalities. Extensive experiments on the MVTec3D-AD and Eyecandies benchmarks demonstrate that CoGeoAD achieves state-of-the-art performance, effectively capturing both structural and textural anomalies in complex industrial scenarios. our source code is available at https://github.com/kingdomShu/CoGeoAD.

AI.tldr: CoGeoAD是一个统一的基于CLIP的零样本3D异常检测框架，通过融合2D颜色图像和3D几何结构来检测工业产品中的表面和结构缺陷。
AI.motivation: 工业质量检测中标注异常样本稀缺，现有方法缺乏有效融合2D颜色图像与3D几何结构的机制，难以在统一框架中同时检测表面缺陷和结构缺陷。
AI.method: 提出数据驱动多视图注意力(MVA)机制自适应聚合3D特征，以及多阶段颜色-几何融合(MS-CGF)模块层次化整合双模态多层次特征，通过构建像素对齐的多视角图像实现颜色与几何特征的融合。
AI.result: 在MVTec3D-AD和Eyecandies基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能，有效捕捉复杂工业场景中的结构和纹理异常。
AI.conclusion: CoGeoAD框架成功实现了零样本3D异常检测，为工业质量检测提供了一种有效的统一解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation (generating 3D human motion from text descriptions), while this paper is about Zero-Shot 3D Anomaly Detection for industrial quality inspection. Although both use computer vision techniques and potentially CLIP/VLMs, the goals are entirely different - one generates human motion, the other detects defects in industrial products. The methods (multi-view attention, color-geometric fusion for anomaly detection) do not address any of the pain points related to text-to-motion generation, video-to-motion conversion, or motion-quality control.

title: Quantization Inflates Reasoning: Token Inflation as a Hidden Cost of Low-Bit Reasoning Models
summary: Quantization is widely used to reduce the inference cost of large language models, but its effect on reasoning models is not fully captured by final-answer accuracy or per-token latency. We show that low-bit post-training quantization can introduce a hidden test-time compute cost: quantized reasoning models often generate longer chains of thought even when they still answer correctly. Across mathematical reasoning, code generation, scientific question answering, and agentic tool-use benchmarks, we find that INT4/INT3 quantization can preserve accuracy but increase reasoning-token usage, offsetting the expected per-token speedup. To measure this effect, we introduce the CoT Token Inflation Ratio, which compares reasoning length between quantized and full-precision models averaged across all evaluation benchmarks. We further show that token inflation is accompanied by behavioral changes in the reasoning trace, including more intermediate steps and greater semantic repetition. These changes translate into measurable end-to-end real-world serving penalties. Finally, we evaluate mitigation strategies and find that prompting and decoding-time sampling offer inconsistent accuracy-length trade-offs, while quantization-aware training shows more promise in reducing both accuracy degradation and token inflation. Our results suggest that reasoning-token usage should be reported alongside accuracy when evaluating quantized reasoning models.

AI.tldr: 低比特量化（如INT4/INT3）在保持推理模型准确率的同时，会导致思维链（CoT）生成的token数量显著增加，抵消了量化带来的按token加速优势。
AI.motivation: 现有评估指标（最终答案准确率或per-token延迟）未能充分反映量化对推理模型的实际影响，作者希望揭示这一隐藏的测试时计算成本。
AI.method: 引入"CoT Token Inflation Ratio"指标，比较量化模型与全精度模型在数学推理、代码生成、科学问答和工具使用基准上的平均推理长度变化，并分析推理痕迹的行为变化。
AI.result: INT4/INT3量化可保留准确率但增加推理token使用量，伴随中间步骤增多和语义重复增加，最终导致端到端服务延迟惩罚， mitigation策略效果有限。
AI.conclusion: 评估量化推理模型时应同时报告准确率和推理token使用量，量化感知训练在减少准确率下降和token膨胀方面更具前景。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM quantization and reasoning efficiency (analyzing CoT token inflation in mathematical/code reasoning tasks), which is in a completely different field from Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different: it deals with language model optimization, not computer graphics, video generation, or 3D motion generation. It has no connection to the pain points about video-to-motion conversion, motion-text consistency, or VLM-based quality filtering for motion generation.

title: Heterogeneous and Adept Snapshot Distillation for 3D Semantic Segmentation
summary: Multi-modal fusion and multi-model ensembling are prevalent in enhancing the performance of 3D semantic segmentation. Despite the impressive performance, these methods either rely on auxiliary input signals or suffer from costly computational expense. To efficaciously enhance the segmentation performance without introducing intolerable costs, we propose to transfer the rich knowledge from the multi-modal model (i.e., point clouds and images) and multiple model experts to the point-cloudbased network through knowledge distillation. Specifically, we present Information-oriented Heterogeneous Distillation (IHD) to help the uni-modal model absorb the complementary knowledge from the multi-modal teacher. We design the Information-Oriented Filtering (IOF) strategy to select informative images from the continuous image sequence for multi-modal fusion. This practice can boost the performance of the multi-modal teacher, thus benefiting the learning of the student. Besides, as opposed to vanilla model ensembling that requires the separate training of each expert, we propose Adept Snapshot Distillation (ASD). ASD treats the freely available model snapshots generated during the training phase as multiple experts, which significantly reduces the training cost for model ensembling. For each expert teacher, it only provides supervision to the student in the class where it is adept. The resulting Heterogeneous and Adept Snapshot Knowledge Distillation, dubbed HAS-KD, attains state-of-the-art results on ScanNetV2 and S3DIS datasets. HAS-KD can be seamlessly integrated into contemporary 3D segmentation algorithms and bring considerable gains without introducing extra inference burdens. The code will be made publicly available upon publication.

AI.tldr: 提出了HAS-KD（异构与熟练快照知识蒸馏）方法，通过知识蒸馏将多模态模型和多模型专家的丰富知识传递给单模态点云网络，在不增加推理成本的情况下提升3D语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态融合和多模型集成方法虽然能提升3D语义分割性能，但存在依赖辅助输入信号或计算成本高的问题。作者希望能够在不引入额外成本的情况下有效提升分割性能。
AI.method: 提出三种核心技术：1）信息导向异构蒸馏(IHD)将多模态教师(点云+图像)的知识传递给单模态学生；2）信息导向滤波(IOF)从连续图像序列中选择信息量大的图像；3）熟练快照蒸馏(ASD)将训练过程中的模型快照作为专家，仅让学生学习每个专家擅长的类别。
AI.result: 在ScanNetV2和S3DIS数据集上达到最先进水平，可无缝集成到当代3D分割算法中，且不增加推理负担。
AI.conclusion: HAS-KD能有效提升3D语义分割性能，无需额外推理开销，具有良好的通用性和实用性。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation (generating 3D human motion from text/video), while this paper is about 3D Semantic Segmentation (point cloud understanding). Even though both involve 3D data, they are fundamentally different tasks - motion generation creates temporal sequences of human poses, while semantic segmentation labels spatial 3D geometry. The methods also don't match: knowledge distillation for segmentation vs video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), VLM-based quality control, and 3D motion generation models needed for the profile.

title: Cliff Tokens: Identifying Single-Token Failure Triggers in LLM Mathematical Reasoning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) reach high accuracy in mathematical reasoning, but individual traces on the same problem diverge; some arrive at the correct answer while others fail. Prior work analyzes failure at the step, chunk, or sentence level, or at tokens where failure has already occurred. Neither identifies the precise token that triggers the shift toward failure. We introduce the cliff token, a token where the token-wise potential drops significantly under an adaptive threshold that scales with the local token-wise potential, based on a one-sided two-proportion z-test. Across seven models and three mathematical reasoning benchmarks (GSM1K, MATH500, AIME 2025), cliff tokens act as failure triggers; deleting the first cliff token and resampling recovers pass@64 to 1.0, while keeping it limits recovery to between 0.71 and 1.00. We further introduce a cliff taxonomy of deterministic, uncertain, and sampled-off cliffs, defined by greedy choice and token entropy. Each type has distinct probabilistic characteristics, and the taxonomy generalizes across model scales. Finally, we validate the taxonomy via single-token preference optimization at cliff positions (Cliff-DPO). Trained on GSM8K, Cliff-DPO improves accuracy across benchmarks by up to +6.6. Optimizing at uncertain and sampled-off cliffs improves reasoning, while deterministic cliffs do not.

AI.tldr: 研究大型语言模型(LLM)在数学推理中为何在同一问题上产生不同结果，引入了"悬崖 token"概念来识别导致推理失败的关键token。
AI.motivation: LLM在数学推理任务中表现高精度，但相同问题下 individual traces 会产生分歧（部分正确、部分失败）。现有研究只在 step、chunk、sentence 层面或已发生 failure 的 token 层面分析失败原因，无法精确识别触发失败的关键 token。
AI.method: 提出"悬崖 token"概念：基于自适应阈值（随局部 token-wise potential 缩放）的单边两比例 z-test，识别 token-wise potential 显著下降的 token。在 7 个模型、3 个数学推理基准（GSM1K, MATH500, AIME 2025）上验证。还提出悬崖分类法：确定性悬崖、不确定性悬崖、采样脱离悬崖（基于贪心选择和 token 熵）。
AI.result: 悬崖 token 作为失败触发器：删除第一个悬崖 token 并重新采样，pass@64 恢复至 1.0；保留悬崖 token 则恢复率限制在 0.71-1.0 之间。悬崖分类法具有不同的概率特征，且可跨模型规模泛化。通过单 token 偏好优化（Cliff-DPO）验证分类法：在 GSM8K 上训练，基准准确率提升高达 +6.6%。优化不确定性和采样脱离悬崖可改善推理，确定性悬崖则无法改善。
AI.conclusion: 悬崖 token 是导致 LLM 数学推理失败的关键触发点，通过识别和针对性优化悬崖 token 位置，可显著提升模型推理性能。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM mathematical reasoning ("Cliff Tokens" for identifying failure triggers in text-based LLM generation), which has NO connection to Computer Graphics / Computer Vision - Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different: text-based LLM reasoning vs video-to-3D motion generation. The methods are also different: token-level potential analysis in LLMs vs video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance), VLM-based quality filtering, and 3D motion generation. None of the pain points in the research profile (video-to-3D conversion quality, text-motion consistency, video generation stability) are addressed by this paper.

title: MRI2Rep: Autoregressive Structured Report Generation for 3D Liver MRI
summary: Manual reporting of 3D MRI studies is time-consuming, yet end-to-end structured report generation for 3D liver MRI remains underexplored due to volumetric complexity and scarce paired data. We propose MRI2Rep, an autoregressive framework for liver MRI report generation. From 3,929 real-world MRI-report pairs acquired over a 10-year single-institution cohort, a Report-to-Label Canonicalization (RLC) module converts free-text reports into structured, closed-vocabulary diagnostic sequences without lesion-level annotations. On a held-out test set, MRI2Rep achieves 76.0% case-level sensitivity, 29.4% lesion-level F1, compared with no more than 8.3% for adapted medical vision-language baselines, and 82.4% liver-level accuracy. In a blinded reader study, two radiologists rated 75% and 70% of AI-generated reports as clinically acceptable, compared with 95% and 100% for original reports. Our automated LLM-based judge, LLM-Eval, rated 61.8% of AI-generated reports as acceptable, applying a stricter standard and supporting its use as a conservative proxy. To our knowledge, this is the first end-to-end LI-RADS-structured reporting system for 3D liver MRI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MRI2Rep，一个用于3D肝脏MRI的端到端结构化报告生成框架，首次实现LI-RADS标准化报告自动生成。
AI.motivation: 3D MRI手动报告耗时费力，由于 volumetric complexity 和 paired data 稀缺，肝脏MRI的端到端结构化报告生成一直未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出MRI2Rep自回归框架，包含RLC(Report-to-Label Canonicalization)模块，将自由文本报告转换为结构化、封闭词汇的诊断序列，无需病变级标注。数据来自3929对真实MRI-报告对(10年单机构队列)。
AI.result: 测试集结果：病例级灵敏度76.0%，病变级F1 29.4%，肝脏级准确率82.4%，均优于adapted医学视觉语言基线(最高8.3%)。盲读研究：两位放射科医生分别给75%和70%的AI生成报告评分为临床可接受，原报告分别为95%和100%。LLM-Eval评估61.8%可接受。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个用于3D肝脏MRI的端到端LI-RADS结构化报告系统，RLC模块可无需病变级标注实现报告标准化，LLM-Eval可作为保守的评估代理。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about MRI-to-Report Generation in medical imaging, which is entirely different from the research field of Text-to-Motion Generation in Computer Graphics/Computer Vision. The application domains are completely different: this paper deals with medical report generation from liver MRI scans, while the research profile focuses on video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance), 3D motion generation, and quality control for text-to-motion synthesis. No motion generation, video generation, or related methods are involved.

title: Evaluation Protocols and Validation for Cameras in Indoor Healthcare Monitoring
summary: Camera-based monitoring systems are increasingly adopted in healthcare settings for the continuous assessment of patient movement and activities. However, their technical performance under real-world indoor conditions remains insufficiently characterised, preventing appropriate camera selection for clinical or home adoption and reproducibility. Existing validation studies typically assess either device metrological performance or algorithm accuracy in isolation, and often do not systematically account for practical deployment factors, such as lighting variability, occlusions, and camera positioning. We present two technical validation protocols: the first evaluates the metrological performance of RGB and RGB-D cameras, and the second assesses their use in supporting human pose estimation, validated using state-of-the-art pose estimators. The proposed protocols systematically assess five cameras, four RGB-D and one RGB, under controlled variations in lighting, camera height, viewing angle, and occlusion level within representative indoor scenarios. The experimental results show that metrological performance varies substantially across cameras, with depth bias at 5 m ranging from 50 mm to over 1400 mm depending on the device. For 2D pose estimation, all cameras achieve broadly comparable accuracy, with mean mAP between approximately 78% and 90% across cameras and estimators, whereas 3D reconstruction error differs markedly across devices, with MPJPE ranging from 104 mm to 365 mm, closely reflecting underlying depth-sensing quality. Environmental factors have a camera- and estimator-dependent effect on 3D performance, while camera mounting height has minimal influence within the evaluated range. This work provides evidence-based guidance for the selection and deployment of cameras in healthcare monitoring applications, addressing an important gap in current technical validation practice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两个技术验证协议，用于评估RGB和RGB-D相机在医疗监测场景中的性能，包括元数据性能和人姿估计能力，并在受控环境下系统测试了5种相机设备。
AI.motivation: 现有验证研究通常孤立地评估设备的计量性能或算法准确性，未系统考虑实际部署因素（如照明变化、遮挡和相机位置），导致无法为临床或家庭应用选择合适的相机。
AI.method: 在受控的代表性室内场景中，系统评估5种相机（4种RGB-D和1种RGB）在照明、相机高度、视角和遮挡水平变化下的性能，使用先进的人姿估计器验证2D姿态估计和3D重建效果。
AI.result: 元数据性能在不同相机间差异显著，5米处深度偏差从50mm到1400mm以上不等。2D姿态估计精度相近（mAP约78%-90%），而3D重建误差差异明显（MPJPE为104-365mm），反映深度感知质量差异。环境因素对3D性能的影响取决于相机和估计器，相机安装高度在评估范围内影响较小。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为医疗监测应用中的相机选择和部署提供了循证指导，弥补了当前技术验证实践的重要空白。

relevance_reason: This paper is about camera evaluation for indoor healthcare monitoring using RGB/RGB-D cameras for human pose estimation. This is completely different from the research profile's Text-to-Motion Generation domain. The paper focuses on healthcare/clinical applications with traditional pose estimation, not on video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), text-to-motion generation, VLM-based quality filtering, or 3D motion generation from text descriptions. While both fields deal with "pose estimation," the application domains are entirely distinct - one is for patient monitoring, the other is for computer graphics/animation generation.

title: Reasonable Motion: A General ASP Foundation for Environment Constrained Movement Trajectory Computation
comment: Accepted at: LPNMR 2026 - 18th International Conference on Logic Programming and Non-monotonic Reasoning, 7 - 11 September 2026 - Klagenfurt, Austria
summary: We present a general answer set programming based hybrid quantitative-qualitative method for computing constrained branching trajectory modes for moving objects in real-world settings. The method performs constrained traversal of an environment graph, enumerating geometrically admissible motion behaviours as stable models, each constituting a distinct trajectory mode characterised by both domain-dependent and independent factors such as derived event sequence, map topology, and domain norms. The hybrid trajectory computation method is generally applicable across motion characteristics typically encountered in diverse dynamic domains with moving objects, e.g., autonomous driving. We demonstrate applicability and highlight how computed trajectories are traceable to their underlying stable model, thereby affording verifiable interpretability that purely learned approaches cannot provide. We also perform an empirical evaluation with Argoverse 2, a large-scale real-world autonomous driving benchmark representative of the class of dynamic domains within the scope of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于答案集编程(ASP)的混合定量-定性方法，用于计算现实环境中移动对象的约束分支轨迹模式。该方法通过约束遍历环境图，将几何上可接受的行为枚举为稳定模型，每个稳定模型构成一个独特的轨迹模式，兼具领域依赖和独立因素特征。
AI.motivation: 纯学习方法缺乏可解释性和可验证性，无法追溯轨迹的生成原因。该研究旨在提供一种可追溯、可验证的轨迹计算方法，解决自主驾驶等领域对轨迹可解释性的需求。
AI.method: 提出基于答案集编程(ASP)的混合定量-定性方法，对环境图进行约束遍历，将几何上可接受的动作行为枚举为稳定模型。每个稳定模型代表一个独特的轨迹模式，融合了事件序列、地图拓扑和领域规范等因素。
AI.result: 在Argoverse 2大规模真实自动驾驶数据集上进行实证评估，验证了方法的适用性。计算出的轨迹可追溯到其底层稳定模型，提供了纯学习方法无法实现的可验证可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法具有普遍适用性，可应用于自主驾驶等多种动态领域。通过将轨迹计算与稳定模型关联，实现了轨迹的可追溯性和可验证解释，为安全关键的轨迹预测任务提供了新的解决思路。

title: Minimalist Preprocessing Approach for Image Synthesis Detection
summary: Generative models have significantly advanced image generation, resulting in synthesized images that are increasingly indistinguishable from authentic ones. However, the creation of fake images with malicious intent is a growing concern. Low-configured smart devices have become highly popular, making it easier for deceptive images to reach users. Consequently, the demand for effective detection methods is increasingly urgent. In this paper, we introduce a simple yet efficient method that captures pixel fluctuations between neighboring pixels by calculating the gradient, which highlights variations in grayscale intensity. This approach functions as a high-pass filter, emphasizing key features for accurate image distinction while minimizing color influence. Our experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that our method achieves accuracy levels comparable to state-of-the-art techniques while requiring minimal computational resources. Therefore, it is suitable for deployment on low-end devices such as smartphones. The code is available at https://github.com/vohoaidanh/adof.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于梯度的高效方法，通过计算相邻像素间的灰度变化来检测AI生成的假图像，适用于低配置设备。
AI.motivation: 生成模型可以合成逼真的假图像，这些假图像容易被恶意传播，而低配置智能设备的普及使得假图像更容易到达用户，因此需要一种适合在低-end设备上部署的高效检测方法。
AI.method: 通过计算相邻像素的梯度来捕捉像素波动，突出灰度强度变化，该方法作为高通滤波器强调关键特征同时最小化色彩影响。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明该方法达到了与最先进方法相当的准确率，同时仅需极少的计算资源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法简单高效，适合部署在智能手机等低-end设备上，代码已开源。

relevance_reason: The paper is about AI-generated image detection (image forensics) using gradient-based methods, which is completely different from the research profile's Text-to-Motion Generation domain. The application domain is entirely different - this paper deals with detecting fake images, not generating 3D human motion from text. The methods and goals have no relevance to text-to-motion generation, video-to-3D motion conversion, VLM-based quality filtering, or video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance mentioned in the research profile.

title: GUI agent: Guided Exploration of User-Sensitive Screens
summary: LLM agents are increasingly being used to automate tasks for users within an open GUI environment. They inevitably encounter screens containing user-sensitive information, for which takeover of task execution by the user is highly desirable or even necessary. State-of-the-art LLM-driven agents are usually fine-tuned to complete tasks regardless of the safety implications of their actions. This makes their real-world deployment difficult and adversely affects the reliability. Therefore, it is crucial to identify and categorize user-sensitive states and define user-sensitive queries. This dataset would be to engineers to recognize and request handover to the user in critical scenarios. This short paper develops an explorer agent that systematically explores the query space starting from one demonstrated task to identify queries that, if executed, would lead to user-sensitive states in a GUI environment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个探索器代理，用于在GUI环境中系统性地识别可能导致用户敏感状态的查询
AI.motivation: 当前LLM代理在开放GUI环境中执行任务时，无法识别和处理包含用户敏感信息的屏幕，导致实际部署困难。需要建立一个用户敏感状态和查询的数据集，以便在关键场景下请求用户接管
AI.method: 开发了一个探索器代理，从一个演示任务开始系统性地探索查询空间，识别在GUI环境中执行时会导致用户敏感状态的查询
AI.result: 该方法能够系统性地识别可能暴露用户敏感信息的查询，建立了一个用于训练工程师识别和请求用户接管的数据集
AI.conclusion: 该研究为LLM代理在GUI环境中的安全部署提供了重要基础，通过识别用户敏感状态和相应查询，帮助代理在关键场景下正确请求用户接管，提高系统的可靠性和安全性

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM agents exploring GUI environments to identify user-sensitive screens and queries - entirely different field and application domain. The research profile focuses on Text-to-Motion Generation (Computer Graphics/Computer Vision for generating 3D human motion from text), while this paper addresses LLM agent UI exploration. No overlap in methods, application domains, or research problems.

title: KidRisk: Benchmark Dataset for Children Dangerous Action Recognition
summary: Children are naturally energetic, and during their spontaneous activities, they often encounter potentially dangerous situations, especially when lacking parental supervision. Identifying actions that pose risks plays a crucial role in ensuring their safety. This paper build a novel challenging dataset, namely KidRisk, including 2,500 short videos of children's actions and 10,000 images for dangerous action of children. We also introduce a benchmark on our newly constructs dataset and find that traditional deep learning models demonstrated limited effectiveness on these tasks. Therefore, we develop vision-language based baselines with exceptional context understanding of visual information. Our proposed methods achieved an accuracy of 83.53% in classifying children's actions and 96.14% in recognizing children's dangerous actions, significantly outperforming traditional approaches. These results confirm that vision-language models are not only feasible but also highly effective in detecting hazardous actions, contributing positively to safeguarding children's safety.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个名为KidRisk的新型数据集，包含2500个儿童行为短视频和10000张危险行为图像，并基于视觉语言模型开发了儿童动作分类和危险行为识别方法。
AI.motivation: 儿童在自发活动中容易遭遇危险情境，缺乏监护时风险更高。识别危险动作对保障儿童安全至关重要，但传统深度学习模型在该任务上效果有限。
AI.method: 构建KidRisk数据集（2500个视频+10000张图像），开发具有视觉信息上下文理解能力的视觉语言模型基线方法。
AI.result: 动作分类准确率达83.53%，危险行为识别准确率达96.14%，显著优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 视觉语言模型在检测儿童危险行为方面可行且有效，能够为儿童安全保障提供积极贡献。

relevance_reason: The paper is about action recognition (classifying dangerous actions from videos/images), which is a different application domain from text-to-motion generation (generating 3D human motion from text/video). Both use Vision-Language Models superficially, but the core task is recognition vs generation - these are opposite directions in the motion understanding pipeline. The pain points in the research profile (video generation instability, quality control of motion conversion, consistency between generated motion and text) are not addressed by a paper focused on recognizing pre-existing actions in children.

title: Position Spaces and Graphs
summary: In this paper, we introduce position graphs, a graph-based reasoning framework based on the formalization of position spaces. This framework utilizes two strict partial orders, representing horizontal and vertical alignment and precedence, to model the relative positions of discrete tokens. Unlike general qualitative spatial calculi, position graphs are constrained by a chain condition and compatibility requirements that focus on rows and columns. We provide a comprehensive theoretical analysis of this representation, beginning with a characterization of graph consistency. Conditions to ensure the consistency of position graphs are established. Furthermore, we investigate the computational complexity of structural pattern discovery, modeled as the induced subgraph isomorphism problem. We demonstrate that this problem remains NP-complete even within the restricted class of position graphs. While initially motivated by document processing, this work focuses on the underlying mathematical properties and algebraic consistency of position-based constraints, providing a formal logical layer that is independent of specific data extraction techniques.

AI.tldr: 本文引入位置图(position graphs)框架，这是一种基于位置空间形式化的图推理框架，利用两个严格偏序分别表示水平对齐和垂直对齐/优先关系来建模离散标记的相对位置。该框架具有链条件和兼容性约束，专注于行和列。论文证明了结构模式发现（诱导子图同构问题）在位置图中仍是NP完全问题。
AI.motivation: 虽然最初动机来自文档处理，但本研究聚焦于位置约束的底层数学性质和代数一致性，提供独立于具体数据提取技术的形式化逻辑层。
AI.method: 利用两个严格偏序（水平和垂直对齐与优先）形式化位置空间，结合链条件和兼容性要求约束行和列特征，对位置图进行图一致性刻画，建立确保位置图一致性的条件，并将结构模式发现建模为诱导子图同构问题。
AI.result: 建立了位置图一致性的刻画条件，确保位置图一致性的条件得到确立；证明了结构模式发现问题即使在受限的位置图类别中仍保持NP完全性。
AI.conclusion: 位置图框架为基于位置约束的推理提供了独立于具体数据提取技术的形式化逻辑基础，该理论框架可推广至其他需要空间推理的领域。

relevance_reason: This paper is about "Position Spaces and Graphs" - a formal/mathematical framework for modeling positional relationships in documents using graph theory and partial orders. It has NO connection to Computer Graphics, Computer Vision, or Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is completely different: it's theoretical computer science/formal methods for document processing, not motion generation, video generation, or any computer graphics/vision task. The paper doesn't address any of the pain points (video-to-3D motion conversion, quality control, VLM-based filtering) and uses entirely different methods (graph partial orders vs diffusion models, VLMs, motion generation models).

title: HiFiVe: High-Fidelity Vehicle Generation Leveraging Auto-Regressive 2D Generative Priors
summary: Existing 3D vehicle generation methods often suffer from low geometric fidelity and blurry textures, hindering their downstream applications. While recent works adopt multi-view diffusion models for high-fidelity texture, they are often constrained by fixed viewpoints, limited resolution, and a reliance on costly fine-tuning to achieve cross-view consistency. In this paper, we propose HiFiVe, a training-free framework for high-fidelity vehicle modeling through joint texture and geometry enhancement by imposing 3D geometric constraints to anchor 2D generative priors. Specifically, we propose an auto-regressive texture refinement pipeline that progressively synthesizes high-resolution textures from arbitrary viewpoints. To ensure cross-view consistency, the coarse geometry serves as a synchronization prior, conditioning each generation step on previously synthesized frames via depth-based warping and multi-view texture fusion. Moreover, the inherent symmetry of vehicles is exploited to mitigate error accumulation. Finally, high-frequency surface details are recovered by refining the mesh geometry using normal maps estimated from the enhanced textures. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world vehicle datasets demonstrate that our method significantly improves both geometric detail and texture quality compared to state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: HiFiVe是一种无需训练的3D车辆生成框架，通过将3D几何约束锚定2D生成先验，实现高保真车辆建模。该方法采用渐进式纹理 refinement流程，利用深度扭曲和多视图融合确保跨视图一致性，并通过对称性约束减少误差累积，最终通过法线贴图 refinement网格几何。实验表明该方法在合成和真实数据集上显著提升了几何细节和纹理质量。
AI.motivation: 现有3D车辆生成方法存在几何保真度低和纹理模糊的问题，而近期多视图扩散模型受限于固定视角、有限分辨率，且依赖昂贵的微调来达到跨视图一致性。
AI.method: 提出HiFiVe框架，包含：1) 自回归纹理refinement流程，从任意视角逐步合成高分辨率纹理；2) 粗几何作为同步先验，通过基于深度的扭曲和多视图纹理融合确保跨视图一致性；3) 利用车辆对称性减轻误差累积；4) 通过从增强纹理估计的法线贴图refinement网格几何，恢复高频表面细节。
AI.result: 在合成和真实车辆数据集上进行了广泛实验，表明该方法相比最先进的基线方法在几何细节和纹理质量方面均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: HiFiVe无需训练即可实现高保真3D车辆建模，有效结合纹理和几何增强，同时保持跨视图一致性，为下游应用提供高质量的车辆模型。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 3D vehicle/car generation, which is a completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion Generation (human motion generation). Even though both involve 3D generation, the target objects are entirely different - vehicles vs human motion. The research profile specifically deals with generating and controlling human motion from text/video, while this paper focuses on generating 3D car models with proper geometry and texture. The methods, pain points, and objectives are unrelated.

title: Fuzzy Quantification over OWL Ontologies and Knowledge Graphs
summary: This paper presents a versatile framework for evaluating fuzzy quantification queries over both standard and fuzzy ontologies as well as knowledge graphs. The primary objective is the retrieval of individuals that satisfy queries articulated via Type I or Type II fuzzy quantified expressions. A key advantage of the proposed approach is its inherent adaptability: it remains entirely agnostic to the quantifier type, the underlying evaluation method, and the specific data source of the ontology (i.e., OWL ontologies or RDFS knowledge graphs). Furthermore, we present Q2S2, a publicly accessible implementation of this system developed to support future research.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个通用框架，用于在标准/模糊本体论和知识图谱上评估模糊量化查询，能够检索满足I型或II型模糊量化表达的个体。该框架具有内在适应性，与量化器类型、评估方法和数据源（OWL本体或RDFS知识图谱）无关。还提供了Q2S2公开实现。
AI.motivation: 需要一种灵活、通用的方法来处理不同类型的模糊量化查询，覆盖各种本体论和知识图谱，以支持复杂推理任务。
AI.method: 设计了一个与量化器类型、评估方法和数据源完全无关的通用框架，能够处理I型和II型模糊量化表达式。
AI.result: 成功构建了通用框架并实现了Q2S2系统，可处理OWL本体和RDFS知识图谱上的模糊量化查询。
AI.conclusion: 该框架具有高度适应性，为模糊本体论和知识图谱上的查询评估提供了通用解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about fuzzy quantification over OWL ontologies and knowledge graphs (semantic web/knowledge representation), while the research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation in Computer Graphics/Computer Vision. There is no application domain match - the paper deals with ontology reasoning and knowledge graph queries, not 3D motion generation, video generation, or any computer graphics task. The methods are entirely different (ontology-based reasoning vs. diffusion models/VLM for motion synthesis).

title: Physics Question Scene Graph: Fine-grained Evaluation of Physical Plausibility in Text-to-Video Generation
summary: Video generation models are increasingly capable of producing realistic videos, but they still struggle to generate videos that follow basic physical laws. Compounding this is a lack of reliable granular evaluation methods for localizing and specifying physical law violations in videos. We address this by introducing Physics Question Scene Graph (PQSG), a hierarchical question-based evaluation pipeline. PQSG evaluates generated videos by checking their faithfulness to a prompt across objects, actions, and adherence to physical laws using a graph-based hierarchy of questions generated by a vision-language model (VLM), guided by high-quality in-context examples. By representing questions as a graph, PQSG introduces logical dependencies within questions, ensuring that each query is contextually valid. Moreover, PQSG provides granular assessments of which qualities of the video violate physical plausibility constraints. We validate PQSG by creating FinePhyEval, a dataset with physics-based prompts and corresponding generated videos from diverse state-of-the-art video generation models (Sora 2, Veo 3, and Wan 2.1), with each video annotated across multiple categories by humans. Using FinePhyEval, we measure the correlation between PQSG's fine-grained scores and human judgments, showing higher overall correlations than prior work. We also find that PQSG ranks closed-source models higher than Wan 2.1 on physical realism. Lastly, we show that the annotations we provide in FinePhyEval can also be used for subtask evaluation: we benchmark two strong VLMs on generating and answering questions, finding that while models can create human-like questions, they still fall short of human performance in answering them.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Physics Question Scene Graph (PQSG)，一种基于层次化问题的新型评估管道，用于评估视频生成模型对物理定律的遵循程度。通过FinePhyEval数据集验证，表明PQSG与人类判断的相关性高于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 视频生成模型虽能产生逼真视频，但难以生成遵循基本物理定律的视频，且缺乏可靠的细粒度评估方法来定位和指定物理定律违规。
AI.method: 使用视觉语言模型(VLM)生成基于图形层次的问题，检查生成视频在对象、动作和物理定律方面的忠实度；通过逻辑依赖关系确保问题上下文有效性；创建FinePhyEval数据集进行人工标注验证。
AI.result: PQSG与人类判断的整体相关性高于先前工作；PQSG将闭源模型对Wan 2.1的物理真实感排名更高；模型虽能生成类似人类问题，但在回答问题方面仍不及人类表现。
AI.conclusion: PQSG作为一种新的细粒度评估方法，能够更有效地评估视频生成模型对物理定律的遵循程度，为视频生成领域提供了有价值的评估工具。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses Text-to-Video generation evaluation, which is a fundamentally different application domain from Text-to-Motion Generation. While both use VLM and diffusion models, the target output is completely different: 2D video vs 3D human motion. The pain points are also different - this paper focuses on physical plausibility in videos, not quality control of video-to-motion conversion or motion-text consistency. Although it mentions Wanxiang (also in the research profile), the evaluation framework targets video generation quality, not motion generation quality. A paper about "diffusion for image generation" getting low score for "diffusion for human motion generation" applies here - the application domains are distinct.

title: Confidence Sequences for Online Statistical Model Checking of Markov Decision Processes
summary: Markov decision processes (MDPs) are a classic model of decision making under uncertainty, exhibiting both non-deterministic choice as well as probabilistic uncertainty. Traditionally, exact knowledge of the underlying probabilities is assumed. However, this often is unrealistic, e.g.\ when modelling cyber-physical systems or biological processes. Here, statistical methods provide a way towards obtaining meaningful guarantees. The classical approach is to gather samples in the MDP, use these to draw statistical conclusions about the transition probabilities, and from there obtain bounds on the true value; then, if these bounds are too broad, repeat. However, existing implementations of this approach are either subtly incorrect or sub-optimal, and quite often both. We present several \emph{confidence sequences}, which are specifically designed for such \enquote{online} settings, implement all of them in an efficient tool, and show their practical applicability. In particular, we show that they outperform classical \enquote{union-bound} style approaches, and overall our implementation requires 50x less samples on average than previous state of the art.

AI.tldr: 本文研究马尔可夫决策过程(MDPs)中概率未知情况下的决策问题，提出使用置信序列进行在线设置下的统计推断，并开发了高效工具，实验表明该方法比传统并集界方法快50倍。
AI.motivation: 传统MDP假设精确已知转移概率，这在实际应用（如网络物理系统、生物过程建模）中往往不现实，需要统计方法来获取有意义的保证。
AI.method: 提出几种专门为在线场景设计的置信序列，实现为高效工具，通过在MDP中采集样本进行统计推断获得转移概率的界。
AI.result: 性能优于传统的并集界方法，平均所需样本数比现有最先进方法少50倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为概率未知的MDP提供了一种有效且高效的统计保证途径，具有重要的实际应用价值。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) and statistical model checking - a reinforcement learning/decision theory topic. It has NO connection to Computer Graphics / Computer Vision or Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different: MDP analysis vs video-to-motion generation. The paper doesn't address any of the pain points (video generation stability, VLM filtering, motion-text consistency) and uses completely different methods (confidence sequences for MDPs vs video generation models and VLM-based quality control).

title: LEVIRDet: A Million-Scale 159-Category Dataset and Foundation Model for Universal Remote Sensing Object Detection
summary: Remote sensing object detection has advanced rapidly with the development of large-scale benchmarks and modern detection architectures. However, existing datasets and detectors remain fragmented. Most benchmarks focus on limited categories, fixed spatial resolutions, or a single sensor, while detectors still struggle to work across different sensors and categorical systems. In this paper, we introduce LEVIRDet-159, the largest and most comprehensive remote sensing object detection dataset to date, with 159 categories, 2.56 million bounding boxes, and 700k fine-grained annotations under a multi-level taxonomy. In each key scale dimension, LEVIRDet-159 exceeds the corresponding largest existing remote sensing object detection dataset, containing approximately (7x) more images, (6x) more object instances, and (4x) more categories. Based on this dataset, we design LEVIRDetNet, a scale-hierarchy-aware detection foundation model for universal remote sensing object detection. LEVIRDetNet couples online visual Ground Sampling Distance (GSD) prediction, GSD-conditioned query modulation and allocation, and a hierarchy-aware detection head for mixed-granularity remote sensing supervision. Under stringent evaluation settings, LEVIRDetNet demonstrates strong cross-domain generalization. Even without target-domain training or fine-tuning, it achieves state-of-the-art detection performance on 9 external benchmarks, improving the strongest fully supervised competing methods by 5.02 mAP on average under each benchmark's primary metric. We hope this study will facilitate the development of strongly generalizable remote sensing object detection across diverse category systems, spatial resolutions, and sensor platforms. The dataset and trained models will be released at https://qinzheyang.github.io/LEVIRDet/, accompanying the final paper.

AI.tldr: 本文发布了LEVIRDet-159，这是目前规模最大、最全面的遥感目标检测数据集，包含159个类别、256万个边界框和70万个细粒度注释。基于该数据集，设计了LEVIRDetNet尺度层级感知检测基础模型，实现跨域泛化和9个外部基准测试的最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感目标检测数据集和检测器存在碎片化问题：数据集类别有限、空间分辨率固定或仅支持单一传感器；检测器难以跨不同传感器和类别系统工作。需要一个大规模、多类别、多分辨率的通用遥感检测数据集和通用检测模型。
AI.method: 构建LEVIRDet-159数据集(159类、2.56M边界框、700K细粒度注释)，设计LEVIRDetNet模型包含在线GSD预测、GSD条件查询调制分配和层级感知检测头，在9个外部基准测试上评估跨域泛化能力。
AI.result: LEVIRDet-159在各个关键规模维度上超过现有最大遥感检测数据集：约7倍图像、6倍目标实例、4倍类别。LEVIRDetNet无需目标域训练或微调，在9个外部基准测试上实现SOTA性能，平均优于最强全监督方法5.02 mAP。
AI.conclusion: LEVIRDet-159和LEVIRDetNet推动强泛化遥感目标检测研究，支持跨不同类别系统、空间分辨率和传感器平台的通用检测，为大规模基准测试和现代检测架构发展奠定基础。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about remote sensing object detection (detecting objects in satellite/aerial imagery), while the research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation in Computer Graphics/Computer Vision. The application domains are fundamentally different: motion/animation generation vs. object detection. Even though both involve computer vision, the tasks, methods, and goals are entirely distinct - this paper has no relevance to text-to-motion generation, video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance, or VLM-based quality control for motion generation.

title: AI Snitches Get Glitches: Towards Evading Agentic Surveillance
summary:
To better assist users with completing challenging tasks, AI agents mediate communications, access data, and interact with different APIs. Many employers (and even nation-states) already provide their users with this technology. However, widespread adoption of AI agents creates a new risk to abuse access to user data for another goal: surveilling users. These users might not even have the ability or permission to control the actions and data accesses of the surveilling agents.
  We introduce and formalize the problem of agentic surveillance: the ability of an AI agent to analyze available information, craft a report, and send it out using available tools. To evaluate surveillance capabilities across different models, we create SurveilBench, a dataset of various reporting scenarios focusing on three domains: corporate, education, and police. We find that some models exhibit emergent (i.e., unprompted) tendencies to help surveillance, but they also report the attempts to surveil users to the government.
  Finally, we repurpose prompt injections for evading surveillance and develop three evasion techniques that hide from, deceive, or induce over-escalation in surveillance agents. We conclude that agentic surveillance can already be easily implemented and, therefore, call for a comprehensive technical, ethical, and legislative framework to protect users.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AI智能体监控(agentic surveillance)问题，即AI智能体可能被滥用来分析用户信息、生成报告并发送给第三方。作者创建了SurveilBench数据集，涵盖企业、教育和警察三个领域，并发现某些模型存在 emergent 的监控倾向。同时开发了三种规避技术来逃避监控。最终呼吁建立全面的技术、伦理和法律框架来保护用户。
AI.motivation: 随着AI智能体技术的普及，用户面临被监控的新风险。AI智能体可以访问数据、与API交互并执行任务，这些能力可能被滥用于监控用户。用户可能无法控制或意识到这些监控行为的存在，因此需要研究这一问题并寻找解决方案。
AI.method: 1. 提出并形式化定义智能体监控问题 2. 创建SurveilBench数据集，包含企业、教育和警察三个领域的各种报告场景 3. 评估不同模型在各种场景下的监控能力 4. 开发三种规避技术：隐藏、欺骗和诱导过度升级
AI.result: 1. 某些模型表现出emergent(非prompted)的帮助监控的倾向 2. 这些模型还会向政府报告试图监控用户的尝试 3. 开发的三种规避技术可以有效逃避监控智能体 4. 智能体监控已经可以很容易地实现
AI.conclusion: 智能体监控已经可以很容易地实现，需要建立全面的技术、伦理和立法框架来保护用户免受此类监控行为的侵害。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely irrelevant to the research profile. The research profile is about Computer Graphics/Computer Vision - specifically Text-to-Motion Generation (converting text descriptions to 3D human motion for graphics/animation). The paper is about AI agent surveillance and privacy/security issues - an entirely different field focused on monitoring user data and evading surveillance. There is no overlap in application domain, methods, or research goals whatsoever.

title: ESTANet: Efficient Online Error Detection in Procedural Videos via Prediction Inconsistency
summary: An efficient and accurate system for detecting errors in procedural tasks is crucial for supporting human needs in daily life, as it can provide instant notifications and guide people to correct mistakes. In this work, we study real-time online error detection in procedural videos from a simple but overlooked perspective: the prediction behavior of action detectors themselves. Instead of designing complex architectures or specialized supervision, we observe that action detectors naturally exhibit different prediction characteristics depending on their sensitivity to input dynamics and temporal context. We therefore propose ESTANet (Error-Sensitive and Temporally-vArying Network), a lightweight framework that detects errors by exploiting inconsistencies among action predictions produced by a small set of action detectors. We construct standard and error-sensitive action detectors that behave similarly on correct executions but respond differently when errors occur. Meanwhile, detectors operating with different temporal contexts further amplify prediction inconsistencies when the procedure deviates from the intended sequence. During inference, we detect errors by aggregating mismatches between standard and error-sensitive predictions through majority voting to flag frames that contain errors. Extensive experiments on EgoPER, Assembly-101-O, and EPIC-Tent-O demonstrate that ESTANet achieves state-of-the-art performance in online error detection while maintaining real-time efficiency with a lightweight architecture. Our results highlight that leveraging the intrinsic properties of action detectors can yield a powerful and practical solution for online error detection without increasing architectural design complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ESTANet框架，通过利用多个具有不同敏感度的动作检测器之间的预测不一致性来实现实时在线错误检测。该方法无需复杂架构或专门监督，即可有效识别程序化任务中的错误。
AI.motivation: 现有的错误检测方法通常需要复杂架构或专门监督，缺乏轻量级且高效的解决方案。作者观察到动作检测器对输入动态和时间上下文具有不同敏感性，这一特性可用于错误检测。
AI.method: 构建标准和错误敏感两种类型的行为检测器，它们在正确执行时表现相似，但在错误发生时响应不同。同时，使用不同时间上下文的检测器进一步放大预测不一致性。通过多数投票聚合标准与错误敏感预测之间的不匹配来标记错误帧。
AI.result: 在EgoPER、Assembly-101-O和EPIC-Tent-O数据集上达到最先进的在线错误检测性能，同时保持实时效率和轻量级架构。
AI.conclusion: 利用动作检测器的内在特性可以产生强大且实用的在线错误检测解决方案，无需增加架构设计复杂性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about error detection in procedural videos (video understanding/quality assurance), which is completely different from Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely orthogonal: the profile seeks to generate 3D motion from text/video, while this paper detects errors in existing videos. Even though both involve "motion" or "video", the goal, methods, and application are fundamentally different. This paper does not address any of the stated pain points (video-to-3D motion conversion, text-to-motion consistency, video generation stability, VLM-based quality filtering for generated content).

title: Agentic System as Compressor: Quantifying System Intelligence in Bits
summary: Large language models are turning from isolated predictors into agentic systems: they call tools, retrieve evidence, obey environment constraints, use verifiers, and complete tasks through search and multi-turn interaction. We adopts an analytical viewpoint based on "compression is intelligence": under a fixed task distribution, interface, and compute budget, a stronger agentic system lets a target object be reconstructed with fewer bits. We operationalize the measure with arithmetic coding, seed coding, and a fallback, and evaluate it in five settings: reversed text, chess moves, protein sequences, retrieval-augmented question answering, and semantic story compression; in all of them agentic components reduce codelength. These small, controlled experiments cover component types typical of real agentic systems, show that codelength can analyze how components, observers, and budgets change residual uncertainty, and offer guidance for evaluating real agent systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出用"压缩即智能"的框架来衡量Agent系统的能力：在固定任务分布、接口和计算预算下，更强的Agent系统能让目标对象的重建使用更少的比特数。通过算术编码、种子编码和备用方案在5个场景（反转文本、棋步、蛋白质序列、检索增强问答、语义故事压缩）进行验证，发现Agent组件都能降低码长。
AI.motivation: 当前语言模型正从孤立的预测器转变为Agent系统（可调用工具、检索证据、遵守环境约束、使用验证器、通过搜索和多轮交互完成任务），但缺乏有效评估Agent能力的方法。
AI.method: 采用"压缩即智能"的分析视角，用算术编码、种子编码和备用机制 operationalize 该衡量标准，在5个受控场景中进行评估。
AI.result: 在所有5个设置中，Agent组件都能降低码长，使目标对象可以用更少的信息被重建。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可以分析Agent组件、观察者和预算如何改变残差不确定性，为评估真实Agent系统提供指导。

relevance_reason: This paper is about using "compression as intelligence" framework to evaluate LLM Agent systems through information theory. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, Computer Vision, Text-to-Motion Generation, video generation models (Wanxiang/Seedance), or 3D motion generation. The application domain is completely different - it's about agent evaluation and compression theory, not motion/video generation or visual quality control. The methods (arithmetic coding, seed coding) are unrelated to the research profile's methods (video generation, VLM, motion generation models).

title: REViT: Roto-reflection Equivariant Convolutional Vision Transformer
summary: In this paper, we propose a discrete roto-reflection group equivariant vision transformer with convolutional attention. Roto-reflection equivariant networks preserve the rotational, flip and positional symmetry in feature maps, making them useful for tasks where orientation of the inputs is relevant to the model outputs. In image classification and object detection, most of the studies on roto-reflection equivariant models have focused on using convolutional neural networks rather than vision transformers. In this paper, we examine the challenges involved in achieving equivariance in vision transformers, and we propose a simpler way to implement a discretized roto-reflection group equivariant vision transformer. The experimental results demonstrate that our approach outperforms the existing approaches for developing discrete roto-reflection group equivariant neural networks for image classification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种具有卷积注意力的离散旋转反射群等变视觉Transformer，用于图像分类和目标检测任务。该方法在视觉Transformer中实现了旋转、翻转和位置对称性的等变特性，比之前基于CNN的等变网络更简单有效。
AI.motivation: 现有的旋转反射等变网络研究主要集中于卷积神经网络(CNN)，而视觉Transformer领域的等变研究相对较少。图像分类和目标检测任务中，输入方向与模型输出高度相关，因此保留旋转变换对称性具有重要实际价值。
AI.method: 提出一种离散旋转反射群等变视觉Transformer架构，通过卷积注意力机制实现等变特性。该方法简化了现有等变神经网络的实现复杂度。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的方法在图像分类任务上优于现有的离散旋转反射群等变神经网络方法。
AI.conclusion: 本研究成功在视觉Transformer中实现了离散旋转反射群等变，为该领域提供了更简单的实现方案，实验性能优于现有最佳方法。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses a completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on Text-to-Motion Generation (3D human motion from text/video), while this paper is about Image Classification and Object Detection using equivariance Vision Transformers. Even though both are in the broad CV field, the application domains are entirely different - motion generation vs. image classification. The methods and tasks have no relevance to text-to-motion generation, video-to-3D motion conversion, or VLM-based quality filtering mentioned in the research profile.

title: WinDOM: Self-Family Distillation for Small-Model GUI Grounding
summary: Small ($\sim$2B) GUI-grounding agents are attractive for on-device deployment, accessibility tooling, and low-cost iteration, but at this scale they face two open recipe questions: how to obtain bounding-box training data without expensive human annotation, and how to combine supervised fine-tuning with reinforcement learning. We address both, with the explicit goal of pushing small-model performance rather than scaling up. WinDOM is a $54{,}425$-record grounding corpus harvested by driving an open-source Windows 11 web reimplementation under headless Playwright, with bounding boxes read directly off the DOM and no OCR or human annotation. Self-Family Distillation (SFD) is a single rejection-sampling cold-start parameterised only by the teacher choice: either an EMA of the student (no external model) or a frozen larger same-family teacher. We then treat the saturation depth of the SFD cold-start as an explicit GRPO hyperparameter. On a Qwen3.5-2B student, the under-saturated cold-start is a better GRPO initialiser than the converged one: SFD-4B with Early-init RL gains $+5.4$ OOD-mean ($+3.5$ ScreenSpot-Pro, $+7.0$ OSWorld-G, $+5.8$ ScreenSpot-V2) over the base. The same-size EMA mode lands within roughly one OOD-mean point of the cross-size $4$B variant ($65.2$ vs $66.3$) without an external teacher.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WinDOM数据集和自家族蒸馏(SFD)方法，使~2B参数GUI智能体无需人工标注或外部教师即可训练。在Qwen3.5-2B上，SFD-4B配合Early-init RL在OOD基准上获+5.4提升，自 EMA模式性能接近跨尺寸4B模型。
AI.motivation: 小规模GUI智能体(~2B)易于设备部署和低成本迭代，但面临两个开放问题：如何低成本获取bounding-box训练数据，以及如何结合监督微调与强化学习。
AI.method: 1)构建WinDOM数据集：通过headless Playwright驱动开源Windows 11网页重实现，从DOM直接读取bounding-box，共54,425条记录，无需OCR或人工标注。2)提出自家族蒸馏(SFD)：一种单次拒绝采样冷启动方法，教师选择仅参数化为学生EMA或同家族更大冻结模型。3)将SFD冷启动饱和深度作为GRPO超参数处理。
AI.result: 在Qwen3.5-2B上，未饱和冷启动作为GRPO初始化器优于饱和后的版本。SFD-4B配合Early-init RL相比基线获得：+5.4 OOD均值(+3.5 ScreenSpot-Pro, +7.0 OSWorld-G, +5.8 ScreenSpot-V2)。同尺寸EMA模式性能与跨尺寸4B变体相当(65.2 vs 66.3)。
AI.conclusion: 通过DOM直接读取获取训练数据和自家族蒸馏配合GRPO可有效提升小模型在GUI grounding任务上的性能，无需外部教师或大规模人工标注。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain.
