The methods (INR, FPGA acceleration) are also not relevant to the research profile's methods (video generation models like Wanxiang/Seedance, VLM, 3D motion generation). This is a general computer graphics technique for efficient rendering but does not address any of the specified pain points like text-to-motion consistency or video generation stability.

title: Pulmonary Embolism Risk Stratification from CTPA and Medical Records: Vascular Graphs Are Not All You Need
comment: 8 1/2 pages + 2 pages of references. Accepted for MICCAI 2026. This preprint has not undergone peer review or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this contribution is published in, and available online at, the external reference provided below
summary: Risk stratification for pulmonary embolism (PE) is critical for clinical decision-making. Stratification guidelines are based on patient medical records, parameters measured from computed tomography pulmonary angiography (CTPA), and blood tests. However, blood tests are often missing in routine practice. This work studies whether state-of-the-art models can accurately classify risk stratification from only medical records and biomarkers extracted from CTPA images. We benchmark different approaches to combine medical records and cardiac biomarkers with rich pulmonary vascular information; we add vascular biomarkers to tabular models and apply graph neural networks (GNNs) on the vascular tree's intrinsic graph representation. We use a private dataset (n=353) with uniquely complete data for PE risk stratification. Our results show that, among global features, medical records and cardiac biomarkers are the most significant predictors, while vascular biomarkers do not further improve stratification. Even more surprising, even GNNs on vascular graphs fail to outperform strong tabular baseline on global features. We consider hypotheses, on both models and data, that could explain this suboptimal performance. Our investigation suggests that, counter-intuitively, vascular graphs might hold no discriminative information for PE risk stratification. Code is available from https://github.com/creatis-myriad/GENESIS.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了仅使用病历记录和CTPA图像提取的生物标志物进行肺栓塞风险分层的可行性，比较了表格模型和图神经网络两种方法在353例患者数据上的表现。
AI.motivation: 肺栓塞风险分层对临床决策至关重要，但常规实践中血液检测数据往往缺失。研究旨在探索仅依靠病历和CTPA图像生物标志物是否能实现准确的风险分层。
AI.method: 研究采用了多种方法：1)将血管生物标志物添加到表格模型；2)应用图神经网络(GNN)处理血管树的图结构表示；3)比较了不同特征组合对风险分层的影响。
AI.result: 研究结果出乎意料：1)病历和心脏生物标志物是最重要的预测因素；2)血管生物标志物未能进一步改善风险分层；3)即使使用GNN处理血管图也未能超越强表格基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 反直觉地发现，血管图可能不包含肺栓塞风险分层的判别信息。这一发现挑战了血管图结构对PE风险评估有价值的假设，为未来研究提供了重要参考。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about medical imaging - pulmonary embolism risk stratification from CTPA scans and patient records. The application domain is entirely different from Text-to-Motion Generation in Computer Graphics/Computer Vision. While both papers might use graph neural networks, the use case is medical diagnosis vs. human motion generation - these are completely different fields. The paper does not address any of the pain points related to video-to-motion conversion, text-to-motion consistency, or VLM-based quality filtering for motion generation.

title: Spatio-Temporal Mixture-of-Modality-Experts Diffusion for Quantitative DCE-MRI Synthesis from Incomplete MR Sequences
summary: Quantitative maps from dynamic contrast-enhanced MRI (DCE-MRI) are essential for tumor assessment but are often unavailable due to contrast-agent risks and protocol variability. Prior methods predict these maps from other MRI modalities, yet most assume fixed, fully observed inputs and fail under realistic missingness. We present Spatio-Temporal Mixture-of-Modality-Experts (ST-MoME), a conditional diffusion framework that synthesizes 3D DCE parameter maps from diverse subsets of multimodal MRI. ST-MoME fuses modality-specific expert features through a spatio-temporal gating network that produces voxel-wise, timestep-dependent weights, forming a conditioning tensor that guides denoising. To preserve quantitative fidelity, ST-MoME performs diffusion directly in image space with 3D patch-based training and a Swin-based backbone. On a clinical brain-tumor cohort of 386 patients, we evaluate ST-MoME across 16 controlled modality-availability scenarios. It achieves the lowest mean Normalized Mean Square Error (NMSE) aggregated across all three DCE parameters, with leading performance on $v_p$ and $v_e$, competitive results on $K^{\mathrm{trans}}$, and the lowest reconstruction error within the clinically critical tumor region. A post-hoc analysis of the learned gating dynamics shows a structural-early, physiological-late fusion schedule consistent with clinical intuition.

AI.tldr: ST-MoME是一种条件扩散框架，可从部分可用的多模态MRI数据合成3D DCE参数图，通过时空门控网络实现灵活的多模态融合，在386名脑肿瘤患者的16种模态缺失场景中达到最低重建误差。
AI.motivation: DCE-MRI定量图对肿瘤评估至关重要，但常因对比剂风险和协议变异性而不可用。现有方法假设固定、完全观察到的输入，无法处理实际临床中的模态缺失问题。
AI.method: 提出ST-MoME框架：(1)通过时空门控网络生成体素级、时间步依赖的融合权重，形成条件张量引导去噪；(2)采用3D patch-based训练和Swin-based backbone直接在图像空间进行扩散；(3)在386名脑肿瘤患者数据上评估16种受控模态可用性场景。
AI.result: 在三个DCE参数(vp、ve、Ktrans)上达到最低平均NMSE；在vp和ve上表现领先；Ktrans上具有竞争力；在临床关键肿瘤区域内达到最低重建误差。门控动态分析显示"结构早期、生理晚期"的融合 schedule，与临床直觉一致。
AI.conclusion: ST-MoME能有效处理实际临床中的模态缺失问题，通过条件扩散框架和时空门控机制实现灵活的多模态融合，在定量保真度和临床适用性方面展现优异性能。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about DCE-MRI medical image synthesis from MRI data, while the research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation in Computer Graphics/Computer Vision. Although both use diffusion models, medical image synthesis is a fundamentally different field from human motion generation. As specified in criteria, medical image generation is NOT the same as human motion generation - the application domains are completely mismatched.

title: SAC$^2$-Net: Semantic Anchoring and Complementary-Consensus Fusion for Multimodal Micro-Expression Recognition
summary: Micro-expression recognition (MER) is challenging due to subtle facial movements, limited data, and the ambiguous relationship between Action Units (AUs) and emotion categories. Optical flow and motion magnification have been widely used to describe subtle facial dynamics from different perspectives: the former captures local motion displacement, while the latter amplifies weak appearance changes. In this work, we observe that these two modalities often exhibit asymmetric failure patterns: one modality may become noisy, distorted, or uninformative, while the other still preserves discriminative AU-related evidence. This phenomenon reveals their complementarity, but also raises two key challenges for fusion: cross-modal heterogeneity and spatially varying modality reliability. Motivated by this observation, we propose SAC$^2$-Net, a Semantic Anchoring and Complementary-Consensus Network for multimodal MER, which first aligns visual modalities with semantic anchors and then performs reliability-aware fusion. To reduce cross-modal heterogeneity before fusion, we introduce Semantic Anchoring Soft Alignment (SASA), which converts activated AUs into textual prompts and uses them as stable semantic anchors to align motion-magnified and optical-flow representations. Unlike hard contrastive learning, SASA constructs hierarchical AU-aware soft labels to preserve semantic proximity among samples with overlapping or anatomically related AU patterns. Based on the aligned representations, Complementary-Consensus Fusion (CCF) first repairs unreliable local evidence through complementary exchange and then enforces a shared spatial focus through consensus refinement. Extensive experiments on five MER benchmarks show that SAC$^2$-Net achieves state-of-the-art or highly competitive performance across coarse-grained, fine-grained, large-scale, and cross-dataset evaluation settings.

AI.tldr: SAC²-Net是一种用于微表情识别的多模态融合网络，通过语义锚定软对齐(SASA)和互补共识融合(CCF)解决光流与运动放大模态间的异质性和可靠性差异问题。
AI.motivation: 微表情识别面临三个核心挑战：细微的面部运动、有限的数据以及动作单元(AU)与情感类别之间的模糊关系。光流和运动放大这两种模态虽然能捕捉不同的面部动态信息，但往往表现出非对称的失败模式——一个模态可能变得有噪声或失真，而另一个仍保留区分性证据，这揭示了它们的互补性，但也带来了跨模态异质性和空间变化可靠性两个关键挑战。
AI.method: 提出SAC²-Net网络，包含两个核心模块：1)语义锚定软对齐(SASA)：将激活的AU转换为文本提示作为稳定的语义锚点，利用层级AU感知的软标签来保留具有重叠或解剖相关AU模式的样本之间的语义接近度，从而对齐运动放大和光流表示；2)互补共识融合(CCF)：首先通过互补交换修复不可靠的局部证据，然后通过共识细化强制形成共享的空间聚焦。
AI.result: 在五个MER基准数据集上进行了广泛实验，涵盖粗粒度、细粒度、大规模和跨数据集评估设置，SAC²-Net实现了最先进的或极具竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过语义锚定和多模态互补共识融合策略，有效解决了微表情识别中多模态异质性和可靠性差异的挑战，为微弱面部动态的准确识别提供了新的有效途径。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses micro-expression recognition (classification), not text-to-motion generation (synthesis). Even though both deal with facial motion, they are fundamentally different applications - one classifies/analyzes expressions from video, the other generates 3D motion from text or video. The paper uses optical flow and motion amplification for recognition tasks, while the research profile requires video generation models (Wanxiang, Seedance) and 3D motion generation pipelines. This is a complete application domain mismatch (recognition vs generation).

title: TriViewBench: Controlled Complexity Scaling for Multi-View Structural Reasoning in MLLMs
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) demonstrate strong performance on standard visual question answering benchmarks, yet their scalability under controlled structural complexity remains poorly understood. We introduce TriViewBench, a controlled three-view visual reasoning benchmark constructed from synthetic 3D scenes with explicitly parameterized object count and occlusion. The benchmark contains 1,923 scenes and over 14K Question-Answer (QA) pairs organized into four complexity levels and three reasoning categories: Local Decision, Object Counting, and Global Recovery. We evaluate 18 open- and closed-source MLLMs under a unified prompting protocol. All 18 models exhibit an identical capability hierarchy without exception (Local Decision > Object Counting > Global Recovery), and performance degrades monotonically with complexity: Local Decision tasks decline modestly (12.11% relative drop), while Object Counting degrades substantially (59.14%) and Global Recovery collapses severely (80.02%). Error analysis on Object Counting reveals two mechanistically independent failure modes: single-view tasks are dominated by undercounting due to occlusion blindness, whereas the multi-view task reverses to overcounting due to cross-view identity confusion. Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting yields near-zero overall benefit ($Δ= -0.16\%$) and its effect on Global Recovery is strongly capability-gated, suggesting that the bottleneck lies in cross-view spatial representation rather than reasoning strategy. These findings reveal fundamental scalability limitations in current MLLMs and position TriViewBench as a controlled diagnostic framework for analyzing structural reasoning failures.

AI.tldr: 本文引入TriViewBench，一个基于合成3D场景构建的受控三视图视觉推理基准，用于评估多模态大语言模型(MLLM)在不同结构复杂度下的可扩展性。基准包含1,923个场景和超过14K个问答对，分为四个复杂度级别和三个推理类别。对18个开源和闭源MLLM进行评估，发现所有模型表现出相同的性能层级结构(Local Decision > Object Counting > Global Recovery)，性能随复杂度单调下降，Chain-of-Thought提示几乎无益。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在标准视觉问答基准上表现优异，但其在受控结构复杂度下的可扩展性仍然缺乏深入理解。需要一个可控的诊断框架来分析MLLM的结构化推理能力局限性。
AI.method: 构建TriViewBench基准：从合成3D场景生成具有显式参数化物体数量和遮挡的三视图视觉场景，包含四个复杂度级别和三个推理类别（Local Decision、Object Counting、Global Recovery）。使用统一提示协议对18个开源和闭源MLLM进行系统评估，并分析错误模式。
AI.result: 所有18个模型表现出相同的绝对能力层级（Local Decision > Object Counting > Global Recovery）。性能随复杂度单调下降：Local Decision下降12.11%，Object Counting下降59.14%，Global Recovery下降80.02%。Object Counting的错误分析揭示两种独立失败模式：单视图任务因遮挡盲区导致低估，多视图任务因跨视图身份混淆导致高估。CoT提示几乎无整体收益(Δ=-0.16%)，且对Global Recovery的效果受到能力限制。
AI.conclusion: 当前MLLM存在根本性的可扩展性限制，TriViewBench可作为分析结构化推理失败的控制诊断框架。瓶颈在于跨视图空间表示而非推理策略。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation (generating 3D human motion from text/video), while this paper is about Multi-view Visual Reasoning for MLLMs (evaluating how multimodal models understand 3D scenes from architectural三视图). Even though both involve "3D" and "multimodal models", the tasks are fundamentally different: motion synthesis vs. scene understanding. The paper does not address any of the pain points (video-to-motion conversion, motion-text consistency, video generation stability) mentioned in the research profile.

title: TensorLDM: A Component-Wise Latent Diffusion Model for Volumetric DTI Reconstruction from Sparse DWIs
summary: Reconstructing diffusion tensors from sparse DWIs is critical for accelerating Diffusion Tensor Imaging (DTI) in clinical settings, yet current deep learning approaches frequently yield anatomically inconsistent or physically implausible tensors. We introduce TensorLDM, a component-wise latent diffusion model that processes the six tensor components through two group-specific encoders (for diagonal and off-diagonal elements) while maintaining anatomical consistency via shared DWI conditioning. TensorLDM uses an Anatomy-Conditioned Autoencoder that encourages the latent to focus on tensor properties rather than re-encoding structural information. A shared Cross-Component Attention (CCA) mechanism, applied in both autoencoder refinement and diffusion fine-tuning, models inter-component dependencies, while a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) DWI conditioner provides component-adaptive conditioning. On the Human Connectome Project (HCP) dataset under a single-shell, four-volume sparse acquisition, TensorLDM produces the most accurate downstream tractography and tensors with near-ground-truth physical validity (SPD-violation rate 1.54% vs. 1.40%), with the best or comparable voxel-wise reconstruction accuracy. Geodesic tensor error measured by the Log-Euclidean Metric (LEM) corroborates these gains.

AI.tldr: TensorLDM是一种基于组件的潜扩散模型，用于从稀疏扩散加权成像(DWI)重建扩散张量，通过分组编码器、交叉组件注意力和 DWI 条件器保持解剖学一致性和物理有效性。
AI.motivation: 从稀疏DWI重建扩散张量对于加速临床DTI至关重要，但现有深度学习方法常产生解剖学不一致或物理上不可靠的张量。
AI.method: TensorLDM通过两个分组特定编码器（对角线和非对角线元素）处理六个张量分量，使用共享DWI条件确保解剖学一致性。采用解剖学条件自编码器使潜变量聚焦于张量属性，共享交叉组件注意力(CCA)建模分量间依赖，混合专家(MoE) DWI条件器提供分量自适应条件。
AI.result: 在HCP数据集单壳四体积稀疏采集下，TensorLDM产生最准确的下游纤维追踪和接近真实值的物理有效性张量（SPD违规率1.54% vs 1.40%），具有最佳或可比的体素级重建精度。对数欧几里得度量(LEM)测量的测地线张量误差证实了这些改进。
AI.conclusion: TensorLDM能有效解决稀疏DWI重建中的解剖学一致性和物理有效性难题，在临床加速DTI方面具有重要应用价值。

title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks
summary: The laser welding full-penetration is of critical importance, as it constitutes one of the fundamental factors in achieving defect-free welded joints. Accurate prediction of the penetration state is therefore essential for ensuring weld quality. To this end, this paper introduces SimPhysNet, a novel algorithm that achieves high classification accuracy in laser welding penetration prediction using only a limited number of labelled images. This approach effectively overcomes the limitations of supervised learning classification algorithms, which are hindered in industrial applications by their dependence on extensive, high-quality labelled data. The core of SimPhysNet is a unique self-supervised learning paradigm that embeds physical priors into a contrastive learning framework. By incorporating a physics-informed neural network (PINN), the model is guided to extract physically meaningful features of the molten pool and keyhole from a large set of unlabelled data, while three image augmentation tasks further enhance its generalization capabilities. Subsequently, a few-shot learning strategy, based on prototypical networks, enables robust classification by constructing class representations from a minimal set of labelled images. Experimental results demonstrate that SimPhysNet achieves a classification accuracy of 96.06% using only 200 labelled images (approximately 5% of the total labelled dataset), which is comparable to the performance of conventional supervised learning algorithms that utilize the entire labelled dataset. This work presents a new, efficient, and highly accurate method, providing the way for the intelligent automation of laser welding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SimPhysNet算法，通过自监督学习结合物理先验和少样本学习，实现仅用200张标注图像（仅占5%的标注数据集）达到96.06%的分类准确率，用于激光焊接全熔透状态预测。
AI.motivation: 激光焊接全熔透是实现无缺陷焊接的关键因素，准确预测熔透状态对确保焊接质量至关重要。传统监督学习依赖大量高质量标注数据，在工业应用中受限。
AI.method: 提出一种结合物理先验的对比学习框架：1)引入物理信息神经网络(PINN)引导模型从无标注数据中提取熔池和钥匙孔的物理特征；2)设计三个图像增强任务增强泛化能力；3)采用基于原型网络的少样本学习策略进行分类。
AI.result: SimPhysNet仅使用200张标注图像（约5%的标注数据集）达到96.06%的分类准确率，与使用完整标注数据集的传统监督学习算法性能相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种高效、高精度的激光焊接熔透预测新途径，为激光焊接的智能化自动化奠定了基础。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. Although both use neural networks, the application domains are entirely different - industrial welding vs. computer graphics/motion generation. The paper addresses welding quality prediction, not video-to-motion conversion or text-to-motion generation.

title: Disease-Centric Vision-Language Pretraining with Hybrid Visual Encoding for 3D Computed Tomography
summary: Vision-language pre-training (VLP) holds great promise for general-purpose medical AI by leveraging radiology reports as rich textual supervision, yet existing methods struggle with 3D CT imaging due to inefficient visual backbones and coarse semantic alignment. To address these issues, we propose a tailored VLP framework featuring three key components: (1) a CNN-ViT hybrid encoder that replaces ViT's patch embedding with a 3D CNN backbone to efficiently capture local anatomical details while preserving global attention and compatibility with pre-trained cross-modal priors; (2) a disease-level contrastive learning mechanism using learnable query tokens to dynamically extract disease-specific semantics from full reports and align them with corresponding visual features, thereby disentangling distinct diseases within the same anatomical region; and (3) a diagnosis-aware prompt strategy that employs real clinical phrases and aggregated disease prototypes to bridge the pre-training-inference gap and enhance zero-shot diagnostic reliability. Our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on CT-RATE (84.4% AUC, +5.1%) and Rad-ChestCT (75.4% AUC, +5.4%), with even larger gains (+9.8% AUC) on a challenging 60-disease benchmark, and demonstrates strong transferability to radiology report generation, underscoring the generality and clinical utility of our approach.

AI.tldr: 提出一种针对3D CT影像的视觉-语言预训练(VLP)框架，用于通用医学AI诊断。该框架包含三个关键组件：CNN-ViT混合编码器、疾病级对比学习机制和诊断感知提示策略，在CT-RATE、Rad-ChestCT等多个数据集上实现了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLP方法在处理3D CT影像时存在两大问题：(1)视觉骨干网络效率低下，(2)语义对齐粗糙。无法有效利用 radiology reports 作为丰富的文本监督来进行通用医学AI诊断。
AI.method: 提出包含三个关键组件的VLP框架：(1) CNN-ViT混合编码器：用3D CNN骨干替换ViT的patch嵌入，高效捕获局部解剖细节同时保留全局注意力和预训练跨模态先验兼容性；(2) 疾病级对比学习机制：使用可学习查询tokens从完整报告中动态提取疾病特异性语义，并与相应视觉特征对齐，从而区分同一解剖区域内的不同疾病；(3) 诊断感知提示策略：采用真实临床短语和聚合疾病原型来弥合预训练-推理差距，提高零样本诊断可靠性。
AI.result: 在CT-RATE上达到84.4% AUC (+5.1%)，在Rad-ChestCT上达到75.4% AUC (+5.4%)，在60种疾病挑战性基准上增益更大 (+9.8% AUC)。还展示了向放射学报告生成的强迁移性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了最先进的性能，突出了其通用性和临床实用性。通过三个创新组件有效解决了3D CT影像处理的效率问题和粗语义对齐问题，为通用医学AI诊断提供了新的有效方案。

The pain points, methods, and goals are completely unrelated - this paper addresses medical diagnosis rather than quality control of video-to-motion conversion or text-to-motion generation.

title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding
summary: Supervised deep learning has been widely used for weld penetration state classification; however, its performance often degrades significantly under domain shift, such as when transferring models between welding processes with distinct physical mechanisms:for instance, from arc-dominated tungsten inert gas (TIG) welding to keyhole-based laser welding. To overcome this limitation, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) framework integrated with a gradual source domain expansion (GSDE) strategy. Evaluated on dedicated TIG and laser welding datasets, our approach achieves high accuracy in both same-process and cross-process transfer tasks. Specifically, it attains average accuracies of 90.65% on TIGFH and 90.72% on LSPS in same-process settings, surpassing a supervised baseline by 35.83% and 38.87%, respectively. More notably, in cross-process scenarios, it reaches 80.48% for TIG to Laser and 81.13% for Laser to TIG, improving upon the baseline by 43.39% and 43.40%. UMAP visualizations verify that the model learns domain-invariant features while maintaining discriminative class boundaries. This method considerably lowers the relabeling cost for new welding processes and enhances the versatility of intelligent monitoring across different welding systems.

AI.tldr: 针对焊接熔透状态分类中跨领域迁移困难的问题，提出了一种结合渐进源域扩展(GSDE)的无监督域适应(UDA)框架，在TIG和激光焊接数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 监督深度学习在焊接熔透状态分类中性能优秀，但模型在跨领域（如从TIG焊接到激光焊接）迁移时性能显著下降，传统方法需要大量标注数据重新训练，成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出了无监督域适应框架集成渐进源域扩展(GSDE)策略，通过学习域不变特征实现跨领域迁移。
AI.result: 同过程任务：TIGFH达到90.65%，LSPS达到90.72%，比监督基线分别提升35.83%和38.87%；跨过程任务：TIG到Laser达到80.48%，Laser到TIG达到81.13%，比基线分别提升43.39%和43.40%。UMAP可视化验证了模型学习域不变特征的同时保持判别性类别边界。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著降低了新焊接过程的标注成本，增强了智能监控系统在不同焊接系统间的通用性，具有重要的工程应用价值。

title: Efficient Cross-Scale Invertible Hiding Network with Spatial-Frequency Collaboration and Non-Invertible Mechanism
comment: IEEE TNNLS submitted by Junxue Yang, Xin Liao (https://msf-hnu.github.io/)
summary: Image hiding aims to conceal image-level messages within cover images at the same resolution. Invertible neural networks (INN)-based image hiding has emerged as an important branch. It treats concealing and revealing as a pair of inverse problems on image domain transformation and uses INN's forward and backward processes to address them. Due to architectural constraints, existing INN-based methods suffer from single-scale and single-domain feature extraction and limited nonlinear representation capability, resulting in inferior image quality. To mitigate these limitations, we propose an efficient cross-scale invertible hiding network with the spatial-frequency collaboration and the non-invertible mechanism, termed CrosInv. CrosInv exploits cross-scale and spatial-frequency collaborative features while enhancing nonlinear representation. Specifically, we introduce a cross-scale invertible module that bijectively maps inputs to cross-scale representations. To effectively integrate spatial and frequency information, the cross-scale invertible module employs pixel shuffle, Haar wavelet transformation, and their inverse operations for scale transformation. Furthermore, a non-invertible cross dense module is integrated to enhance the nonlinearity. Comprehensive experiments verify the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed CrosInv.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CrosInv，一种基于交叉尺度可逆网络的水印图像隐藏方法。通过融合空域-频域协作特征和非可逆机制，解决现有INN方法单尺度、单一域特征提取和弱非线性表示导致的图像质量下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于可逆神经网络(INN)的图像隐藏方法受架构限制，只能进行单尺度和单域特征提取，非线性表示能力有限，导致隐藏图像质量较差，需要一种能提取多尺度特征并增强非线性表示能力的新方法。
AI.method: 提出交叉尺度可逆隐藏网络CrosInv，包含：(1)交叉尺度可逆模块，使用pixel shuffle、Haar小波变换及其逆操作实现尺度间的双射映射；(2)非可逆交叉密集模块，增强非线性表示能力，实现空域与频域信息的有效融合。
AI.result: 综合实验验证了所提CrosInv的有效性和优越性，在图像质量指标上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过交叉尺度特征提取和空频协作机制，显著提升了INN-based图像隐藏的图像质量，为该领域提供了一种更有效的解决方案。

title: Concept Removal for Frontier Image Generative Models
summary: Image generative models are trained on massive, largely uncurated internet-scale datasets that contain undesirable visual concepts. Efficiently removing such concepts from the model generations without degrading the quality of output images remains challenging. We introduce a novel concept removal method for frontier diffusion and image autoregressive models, such as SD3.5, Flux, and Infinity. Our intervention replaces the internal bottleneck layer present in all these modern models with a transcoder that is trained to replicate the original layer while structuring it into distinct activation features. This in-place substitution creates an integrated filter through which concept-specific signals can be selectively disabled while preserving the rest of the model's behavior. Since the intervention modifies the model backbone rather than attaching an external component, it remains persistent under white-box access. Empirically, the approach achieves state-of-the-art concept removal performance across modern diffusion and autoregressive models, maintains visual generation quality, provides robustness against adversarial prompts, and supports sequential removal of diverse concepts. This positions our method as a practical approach for concept removal in frontier image generative models.

title: H-Adapter: Pose-Robust Hairstyle Transfer via Attention-Derived, Source-Aligned Hair Masks
summary: Hairstyle transfer has practical applications such as virtual try-on, yet remains challenging when the source and reference exhibit large head-pose discrepancies. We propose H-Adapter, which improves pose robustness by training with a region-specific loss that disentangles hair and non-hair objectives and thereby induces spatially disentangled cross-attention, from which a source-aligned hair edit mask is derived to guide diffusion-based inpainting. Experiments on pose-agnostic and pose-different subsets demonstrate strong quantitative results, including the best FID, $\mathrm{FID}_{\mathrm{CLIP}}$, and CLIP-I under pose differences, while maintaining competitive non-hair preservation and improving qualitative fidelity to fine-grained reference hairstyle details. Beyond source-conditioned transfer, H-Adapter supports practical extensions including text-to-image generation, auxiliary prompt-based hair color control, and compatibility with an identity-preserving IP-Adapter variant. We also introduce a VLM-as-a-judge protocol and observe consistent gains in hairstyle faithfulness, non-hair preservation, and artifact quality.

AI.tldr: H-Adapter是一种用于发型转换的模型，通过区域特定损失和解耦的交叉注意力机制来处理源图像与参考图像之间头部姿势差异较大的问题，支持多种扩展应用。
AI.motivation: 发型转换在虚拟试穿等方面有实际应用价值，但当源图像和参考图像存在较大头部姿势差异时仍面临挑战。
AI.method: 通过训练区域特定损失来解耦头发和非头发目标，诱导空间解耦的交叉注意力，从中导出源对齐的发型编辑掩码以引导基于扩散的图像修复。
AI.result: 在姿势差异条件下达到最佳FID、FID_CLIP和CLIP-I分数，保持具有竞争力的非头发区域保留效果，并提高了对细粒度参考发型细节的定性保真度。
AI.conclusion: H-Adapter在姿势无关和姿势不同子集上表现出色，支持文本到图像生成、辅助提示的头发颜色控制等实际扩展，VLM作为评判协议证实了发型保真度、非头发保留和伪影质量的持续提升。

title: FeVOS: Foresight Expression Video Object Segmentation
summary: Existing Referring Video Object Segmentation tasks focus on referring expressions describing events, actions or appearances of relevant objects within the observed frames, lacking evaluation in scenarios that require pre-decisive spatio-temporal reasoning, thereby limiting their applicability. To address this, we propose Foresight Expression Video Object Segmentation, a task that queries future events in upcoming video segments and requires masks of the objects in the observed frames as visual answers. For example, in ego-centric scenes, the question "What tool will be used?" demands reasoning over spatio-temporal cues to predict the masks of the next tool to be used, which helps with the understanding of future actions and decisions. To support this task, we introduce FeVOS, a dataset with 968 video clips, 14,525 foresight expressions, and 2,904 chain-of-thought annotations to provide explicit and interpretable reasoning steps. We further develop FeVOS-R1, an MLLM-based model trained on our dataset via a two-stage pipeline of supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning. FeVOS-R1 not only achieves state-of-the-art performance on FeVOS, but also demonstrates strong generalization to existing RVOS benchmarks. We hope this work can inspire more research on predictive reasoning in video perception.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的视频对象分割任务——预见性表达视频对象分割（Foresight Expression Video Object Segmentation，FeVOS），该任务要求模型根据当前帧的时空线索预测未来事件中出现的对象，并输出相应的对象掩码。同时构建了FeVOS数据集和FeVOS-R1模型。
AI.motivation: 现有指称视频对象分割（RVOS）任务仅关注描述当前帧内事件、动作或外观的表达，缺乏对需要时空推理的场景的评估，限制了其在实际应用中的适用性。例如在自我中心场景中，预测"下一步将使用什么工具"需要跨时空线索进行推理。
AI.method: 构建了包含968个视频片段、14,525个预见性表达和2,904个思维链注释的FeVOS数据集；开发了基于多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的FeVOS-R1，采用两阶段训练流程——监督微调和强化学习。
AI.result: FeVOS-R1在FeVOS数据集上实现了最先进的性能，并展现出对现有RVOS基准的强大泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作开创了视频感知中预测推理的新研究方向，有望推动该领域的进一步研究进展。

title: VPA-Guard: Defending and Benchmarking Image-to-Video Generation Against Visual Prompt Attacks
summary: Recent advancements in Image-to-Video (I2V) generation have transformed input images from simple appearance references into interactive control interfaces where visual cues such as arrows, sketches, and emojis orchestrate complex video dynamics with unprecedented controllability. However, these seemingly innocuous static cues can be interpreted by models as executable temporal instructions, unfolding into harmful actions in the generated videos. Despite the severity of this threat, existing safety benchmarks remain predominantly focused on text-based and content-only image-based jailbreaks, leaving implicit visual prompt attacks insufficiently explored. To bridge this gap, we present VVA-Bench, the first systematic benchmark for evaluating video generation safety under categorized vision-centric prompt attacks. Extensive experiments on VVA-Bench demonstrate that state-of-the-art models are highly susceptible to such attacks, with Attack Success Rates (ASR) reaching 100.0\% on Wan 2.7 and 74.8\% on Veo 3.1. To mitigate these risks, we propose VPA-Guard, a retrieval-augmented and self-evolving defense framework. By leveraging few-shot reasoning to identify latent malicious intents, our method reduces the attack ASR by 44.2\% and the harmfulness score by 73.4\% on average, while maintaining the model's utility for legitimate user edits. Our work provides both a rigorous benchmark and an effective defense strategy to advance safe and socially responsible multimodal generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了VVA-Bench首个针对视频生成安全的视觉提示攻击基准，以及VPA-Guard防御框架，解决静态视觉 cues被恶意利用生成有害视频的安全问题。
AI.motivation: 现有安全基准仅关注文本和纯图像内容的 jailbreak，忽视了视觉提示攻击的威胁。视觉 cues（如箭头、草图、表情）可被模型解释为可执行的时间指令，导致生成有害视频。
AI.method: 构建了分类的视觉中心提示攻击基准VVA-Bench，并提出检索增强的自演进防御框架VPA-Guard，利用少样本推理识别潜在恶意意图。
AI.result: SOTA模型极易受攻击：Wan 2.7 攻击成功率100%，Veo 3.1达74.8%。VPA-Guard平均降低攻击成功率44.2%，危害分数降低73.4%，同时保持模型对合法用户编辑的可用性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提供了首个严格的视频生成安全基准和有效防御策略，推动安全且负责任的多模态生成研究。

Although both mention Wanxiang, the paper's application (image-to-video security) is fundamentally different from text-to-motion generation (3D motion synthesis).
